-    <!-- OFFLINE SYNC ENGINE -->
-    <script>
-        (function() {
-            const CACHE_PREFIX = 'ardms_cache_';
-            const QUEUE_KEY = 'ardms_sync_queue';
-            
-            const originalFetch = window.fetch;
-            
-            // Helper to save requests
-            function enqueueRequest(url, options) {
-                const queue = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(QUEUE_KEY) || '[]');
-                queue.push({
-                    id: Date.now().toString(),
-                    url,
-                    options: {
-                        method: options.method,
-                        headers: options.headers,
-                        body: options.body
-                    },
-                    timestamp: Date.now()
-                });
-                localStorage.setItem(QUEUE_KEY, JSON.stringify(queue));
-                console.log('[Sync Engine] Queued offline request:', url);
-                if (typeof showAdminToast === 'function') {
-                    showAdminToast('Offline: Command queued for sync', 'warning');
-                }
-            }
-
-            // Sync Queue Process
-            async function processSyncQueue() {
-                if (!navigator.onLine) return;
-                const queue = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(QUEUE_KEY) || '[]');
-                if (queue.length === 0) return;
-                
-                console.log(\`[Sync Engine] Processing \${queue.length} queued requests...\`);
-                
-                let successCount = 0;
-                let newQueue = [...queue];
-                
-                for (let i = 0; i < queue.length; i++) {
-                    const req = queue[i];
-                    try {
-                        const res = await originalFetch(req.url, req.options);
-                        if (res.ok) {
-                            successCount++;
-                            newQueue = newQueue.filter(r => r.id !== req.id);
-                        } else {
-                            // If server responded with error, we still remove it so we don't infinitely retry bad requests,
-                            // UNLESS it's a 502/503/504 indicating the server is actually down.
-                            if (res.status >= 500) throw new Error("Server down");
-                            newQueue = newQueue.filter(r => r.id !== req.id);
-                        }
-                    } catch (e) {
-                        console.warn('[Sync Engine] Queue sync failed for', req.url, e);
-                        break; // Stop processing, network still bad
-                    }
-                }
-                
-                localStorage.setItem(QUEUE_KEY, JSON.stringify(newQueue));
-                if (successCount > 0 && typeof showAdminToast === 'function') {
-                    showAdminToast(\`Reconnected: Synced \${successCount} offline command(s) to Web Admin server\`, 'success');
-                }
-            }
-
-            // Hook global fetch
-            window.fetch = async function(url, options = {}) {
-                const method = options.method || 'GET';
-                const isApi = typeof url === 'string' && url.includes('/api/');
-                
-                if (!navigator.onLine && isApi) {
-                    if (method === 'GET') {
-                        const cached = localStorage.getItem(CACHE_PREFIX + url);
-                        if (cached) {
-                            console.log('[Sync Engine] Serving from cache:', url);
-                            return new Response(cached, { status: 200, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } });
-                        }
-                        throw new TypeError("Failed to fetch");
-                    } else {
-                        enqueueRequest(url, options);
-                        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ success: true, queued: true, message: 'Saved offline' }), { status: 200, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } });
-                    }
-                }
-
-                try {
-                    const response = await originalFetch(url, options);
-                    
-                    if (isApi && response.ok) {
-                        if (method === 'GET') {
-                            const clone = response.clone();
-                            const text = await clone.text();
-                            localStorage.setItem(CACHE_PREFIX + url, text);
-                        }
-                    }
-                    
-                    return response;
-                } catch (e) {
-                    if (isApi) {
-                        if (method === 'GET') {
-                            const cached = localStorage.getItem(CACHE_PREFIX + url);
-                            if (cached) {
-                                console.log('[Sync Engine] Serving from cache (network failed):', url);
-                                return new Response(cached, { status: 200, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } });
-                            }
-                        } else {
-                            enqueueRequest(url, options);
-                            return new Response(JSON.stringify({ success: true, queued: true, message: 'Saved offline' }), { status: 200, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } });
-                        }
-                    }
-                    throw e;
-                }
-            };
-
-            window.addEventListener('online', () => {
-                setTimeout(processSyncQueue, 1500);
-            });
-
-            setInterval(() => {
-                if (navigator.onLine) processSyncQueue();
-            }, 10000);
-
-        })();
-    </script>

-<script>
-// --- OFFLINE SYNC WRAPPER ---
-(function() {
-    const originalFetch = window.fetch;
-    window.offlineQueue = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('adminOfflineQueue') || '[]');
-
-    function saveQueue() {
-        localStorage.setItem('adminOfflineQueue', JSON.stringify(window.offlineQueue));
-    }
-
-    async function processQueue() {
-        if (window.offlineQueue.length === 0) return;
-        console.log('[Offline Sync] Processing queue...', window.offlineQueue.length);
-        const queueToProcess = [...window.offlineQueue];
-        window.offlineQueue = [];
-        saveQueue();
-
-        let syncedCount = 0;
-        for (const item of queueToProcess) {
-            try {
-                await originalFetch(item.url, item.options);
-                console.log('[Offline Sync] Synced:', item.url);
-                syncedCount++;
-            } catch (e) {
-                console.error('[Offline Sync] Failed to sync, requeueing:', item.url);
-                window.offlineQueue.push(item);
-                saveQueue();
-            }
-        }
-        if (syncedCount > 0 && window.ReactNativeWebView) {
-             window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage(JSON.stringify({ type: 'OFFLINE_SYNCED', count: syncedCount }));
-        }
-    }
-
-    window.fetch = async function(url, options) {
-        // Only intercept modifying requests
-        if (options && ['POST', 'PUT', 'DELETE'].includes(options.method)) {
-            try {
-                const response = await originalFetch(url, options);
-                // If successful, try processing anything that was queued
-                processQueue();
-                return response;
-            } catch (error) {
-                console.warn('[Offline Sync] Network failed. Queuing request:', url);
-                window.offlineQueue.push({ url, options });
-                saveQueue();
-                if (window.ReactNativeWebView) {
-                    window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage(JSON.stringify({ type: 'OFFLINE_QUEUED', length: window.offlineQueue.length }));
-                }
-                // Return a mock successful response so the UI doesn't break
-                return new Response(JSON.stringify({ success: true, queued: true }), {
-                    status: 200,
-                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
-                });
-            }
-        }
-        return originalFetch(url, options);
-    };
-
-    // Listen for online events
-    window.addEventListener('online', processQueue);
-    
-    // Also try processing queue on load
-    setTimeout(processQueue, 2000);
-})();
-</script>

-        async function openOpDetails(type) {
-            const title = type === 'SOS Calls' || type === 'SOS' ? 'SOS Emergency Missions' : 'Supplies Request';
-            document.getElementById('opModalTitle').innerText = title;
-            document.getElementById('opDetailsModal').style.display = 'flex';
-
-            // Fetch all requests to show a full breakdown
-            try {
-                const res = await fetch(\`\${API_BASE}/rescue-requests\`);
-                const allReqs = await res.json();
-
-                let filtered = [];
-                if (type === 'SOS Calls' || type === 'SOS') {
-                    filtered = allReqs.filter(r => r.type === 'sos' || r.type === 'medical' || r.type === 'pregnancy');
-                } else {
-                    filtered = allReqs.filter(r => r.type === 'food' || r.type === 'delivery' || r.type === 'medical_delivery');
-                }
-
-                const tbody = document.querySelector('#opDetailsModal tbody');
-                tbody.innerHTML = '';
-
-                if (filtered.length === 0) {
-                    tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="5" style="text-align:center; padding:20px; color:var(--text-muted);">No records found for this category.</td></tr>';
-                }
-
-                filtered.forEach((r, idx) => {
-                    const statusTag = r.status === 'completed' ? 'tag-green' : (r.status === 'accepted' || r.status === 'assigned') ? 'tag-yellow' : 'tag-gray';
-                    const time = formatLocalTime(r.created_at);
-                    const updateTime = r.updated_at ? formatLocalTime(r.updated_at) : '--:--';
-
-                    let itemsHtml = '';
-                    if (r.details) {
-                        try {
-                            const d = typeof r.details === 'string' ? JSON.parse(r.details) : r.details;
-                            const items = [];
-                            if (d.food) items.push(\`≡ƒì₧ Food: <b>\${d.food}</b>\`);
-                            if (d.med) items.push(\`≡ƒÆè Medicine: <b>\${d.med}</b>\`);
-                            if (d.sanitary) items.push(\`≡ƒº╗ Sanitary: <b>\${d.sanitary}</b>\`);
-                            if (d.persons) items.push(\`≡ƒæÑ Persons: <b>\${d.persons}</b>\`);

-        function createCommand() {
-            let type = document.getElementById('cmdType').value;
-            // If priority toggle says critical, override type
-            if (currentTaskPriority === 'critical') type = 'critical';
-            let team = '';
-            let teamId = null;
-            let rescuerPhone = null;
-
-            if (currentTargetType === 'group') {
-                let teamEl = document.getElementById('cmdTeam');
-                team = teamEl.options[teamEl.selectedIndex].text;
-                teamId = teamEl.value;
-            } else {
-                let indivEl = document.getElementById('cmdIndividual');
-                team = '≡ƒæñ ' + indivEl.options[indivEl.selectedIndex].text;
-                rescuerPhone = indivEl.value;
-                if (!rescuerPhone) { alert('Please select a rescuer'); return; }
-            }
-            let areaName = document.getElementById('cmdAreaName').value || 'Manual Zone';
-            let coordsEl = document.getElementById('cmdCoords');
-            let coords = coordsEl.value || '';
-            let reqId = coordsEl.dataset.reqId || null;
-            let zoneHtml = coords ? \`<b>\${areaName}</b><br><small style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:11px;">\${coords}</small>\` : \`<b>\${areaName}</b>\`;
-            let desc = document.getElementById('cmdDetails').value;
-
-            if (!desc) { alert('Please enter command details'); return; }
-
-            // === Critical Response: Show high-priority approval popup ===
-            if (type === 'critical') {
-                showCriticalApprovalPopup({
-                    type, desc, teamId, team, areaName, coords, zoneHtml, reqId
-                });
-                return;
-            }
-
-            let cmdLayerData = null;
-            if (drawnLayer) {
-                if (drawMode === 'radius') {
-                    cmdLayerData = { type: 'radius', latlng: drawnLayer.getLatLng(), radius: drawnLayer.getRadius() };
-                } else {
-                    cmdLayerData = { type: 'area', bounds: drawnLayer.getBounds() };
-                }
-
-                // Convert to persistent zone for delivery tasks
-                if (['food', 'delivery', 'medical_delivery'].includes(type) || currentTaskPriority === 'normal') {
-                    const zoneName = \`Command Zone: \${areaName}\`;
-                    fetch(\`\${API_BASE}/zones\`, {
-                        method: 'POST',
-                        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
-                        body: JSON.stringify({
-                            zone_name: zoneName,
-                            zone_geometry: JSON.stringify(cmdLayerData),
-                            color: '#3b82f6',
-                            status: 'active'
-                        })
-                    }).then(() => updateTacticalMap());
-                }
-
-                map.removeLayer(drawnLayer);
-                drawnLayer = null;
-                document.getElementById('distanceInput').value = '';
-                document.getElementById('cmdCoords').value = '';
-            }
-

-            let t = \`\${String(d.getHours()).padStart(2, '0')}:\${String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0')}\`;
-            const localId = \`CMD-TEMP-\${Date.now()}\`;

-            document.getElementById('cmdAreaName').value = '';

-                method: 'POST',
-                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },

-                    group_id: teamId || null,
-                    target_user_id: rescuerPhone || null,
-                    command_type: type,
-                    priority: currentTaskPriority,
-                    command_payload: { message: desc, zone: areaName, coords, layerData: cmdLayerData, rescue_req_id: reqId },

-                })
-            }).then(() => {
-                document.getElementById('cmdCoords').dataset.reqId = '';
-            }).catch(e => console.warn('Command persist failed (offline?):', e));

-        async function dispatchAssignment() {
-            const rawId = document.getElementById('assignReqId').value;
-            const personId = document.getElementById('assignPersonSelect').value;
-            const groupId = document.getElementById('assignGroupSelect').value;
-
-            if (!personId && !groupId) {
-                alert("Please select either a Person or a Group");
-                return;
-            }
-
-            try {
-                if (rawId.startsWith('CMD_REF:')) {
-                    const cmdId = rawId.split(':')[1];
-                    const res = await fetch(\`\${API_BASE}/commands/\${cmdId}/reassign\`, {
-                        method: 'PUT',
-                        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
-                        body: JSON.stringify({
-                            assigned_user_id: personId || null,
-                            assigned_group_id: groupId || null
-                        })
-                    });
-                    if (!res.ok) {
-                        const err = await res.json();
-                        throw new Error(err.error || 'Failed to reassign');
-                    }
-                    showAdminToast('Task successfully reassigned!');
-                } else {
-                    const priority = document.querySelector('#assignModal .modal-title').innerText.toLowerCase().includes('normal') ? 'normal' : 'critical';
-                    const res = await fetch(\`\${API_BASE}/rescue-requests/\${rawId}/accept\`, {
-                        method: 'PUT',
-                        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
-                        body: JSON.stringify({
-                            assigned_user_id: personId || null,
-                            assigned_group_id: groupId || null,
-                            priority: priority
-                        })
-                    });
-                    if (!res.ok) {
-                        const err = await res.json();
-                        throw new Error(err.error || 'Failed to assign task');
-                    }
-                }
-                closeModal('assignModal');
-                refreshAllModules();
-            } catch (e) {
-                console.error("Error dispatching assignment", e);
-                showAdminToast("Error: " + e.message);
-            }
-        }

-        function updateDigitalClock() {

-            if (!clockEl) return;
-            const now = new Date();
-            let hours = now.getHours();
-            const minutes = String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');

-            const ampm = hours >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';
-            hours = hours % 12;
-            hours = hours ? hours : 12;
-            const hoursStr = String(hours).padStart(2, '0');
-            clockEl.innerText = \`\${hoursStr}:\${minutes}:\${seconds} \${ampm}\`;
-        }

-        async function checkDetectedIp() {
-            let detectedIp = null;
-            try {
-                const res = await fetch(\`http://\${window.location.hostname || 'localhost'}:3001/api/server-ip\`);
-                if (res.ok) {
-                    const data = await res.json();
-                    detectedIp = data.ip;
-                }
-            } catch (e) {
-                try {
-                    const res = await fetch(\`\${API_BASE}/server-ip\`);
-                    if (res.ok) {
-                        const data = await res.json();
-                        detectedIp = data.ip;
-                    }
-                } catch(err) {}
-            }
-
-            const gatewayDisplay = document.getElementById('activeGatewayDisplay');
-            const headerIpDisplay = document.getElementById('headerIpDisplay');
-            if (gatewayDisplay) {
-                if (detectedIp && detectedIp !== '127.0.0.1') {
-                    gatewayDisplay.innerText = detectedIp;
-                    if (headerIpDisplay) headerIpDisplay.innerText = detectedIp;
-                } else {
-                    gatewayDisplay.innerText = '127.0.0.1 (Local)';
-                    if (headerIpDisplay) headerIpDisplay.innerText = '127.0.0.1 (Local)';
-                }
-            }
-            const configGatewayDisplay = document.getElementById('configGatewayDisplay');
-            if (configGatewayDisplay) {
-                if (detectedIp && detectedIp !== '127.0.0.1') {
-                    configGatewayDisplay.innerText = detectedIp;
-                } else {
-                    configGatewayDisplay.innerText = '127.0.0.1 (Local)';
-                }
-            }
-        }

-        async function applyManualIp() {
-            const inputVal = document.getElementById('manualIpInput').value.trim();
-            if (!inputVal) {
-                localStorage.removeItem('manualServerIp');
-                showAdminToast("Manual IP cleared! Reverting to Auto-Detect...", "success");
-                setTimeout(() => window.location.reload(), 1200);
-                return;
-            }
-
-            try {
-                const controller = new AbortController();
-                const timeoutId = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 2500);
-                const res = await fetch(\`http://\${inputVal}:3001/api/health\`, {
-                    signal: controller.signal,
-                    mode: 'cors'
-                });
-                clearTimeout(timeoutId);
-
-                if (res.ok) {
-                    localStorage.setItem('manualServerIp', inputVal);
-                    showAdminToast("Manual IP reachable and saved! Reconnecting...", "success");

-        async function confirmTaskGrouping() {
-            const nameEl = document.getElementById('newGroupingName');
-            const name = nameEl ? nameEl.value.trim() : '';
-            if (!name) return alert("Please enter a Custom Group Name for this tactical cluster.");
-
-            const selectedIds = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.group-checkbox:checked')).map(cb => cb.dataset.id);
-            if (selectedIds.length === 0) return alert("Please select at least one request to form a group.");
-
-            // Create group object
-            const groupId = 'GRP-' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 6).toUpperCase();
-            const groupRequests = rescueRequests.filter(r => selectedIds.includes(r.id.toString()));
-
-            // Check assignment
-            const assignType = document.getElementById('groupingTargetType').value;
-            const targetId = assignType === 'individual' ? document.getElementById('groupingPersonSelect').value : document.getElementById('groupingTeamSelect').value;
-
-            const targetName = assignType === 'individual'
-                ? (targetId ? document.querySelector(\`#groupingPersonSelect option[value="\${targetId}"]\`).textContent : '')
-                : (targetId ? document.querySelector(\`#groupingTeamSelect option[value="\${targetId}"]\`).textContent : '');
-
-            const newGroup = {
-                id: groupId,
-                name: name,
-                requests: groupRequests,
-                status: targetId ? 'Assigned' : 'Unassigned',
-                team: targetName || '',
-                assign_type: targetId ? assignType : '',
-                assigned_to: targetId || null,
-                priority: groupRequests.some(r => r.priority === 'Critical') ? 'Critical' : 'Normal',
-                created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
-                type: 'Grouped',
-                custom_polygon: customGroupPolygon
-            };
-
-            groupedTasks.push(newGroup);
-
-            // Mark individual requests as "Grouped" in local state
-            groupRequests.forEach(r => {
-                r.status = 'Grouped';
-            });
-
-            if (targetId) {
-                // Instantly dispatch to backend
-                const localId = \`CMD-GRP-\${String(Date.now()).slice(-4)}\`;
-                const historyEntry = {
-                    id: localId,
-                    desc: \`Tactical Cluster: \${name}\`,
-                    type: 'group',
-                    zone: 'Multi-Sector Triage',
-                    team: targetName,
-                    time: (() => { let d = new Date(); let h = d.getHours(); let m = d.getMinutes(); let a = h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM'; h = h % 12 || 12; m = m < 10 ? '0' + m : m; return h + ':' + m + ' ' + a; })(),
-                    status: 'Assigned',
-                    priority: newGroup.priority.toLowerCase(),
-                    details: JSON.stringify({
-                        cluster_count: selectedIds.length,
-                        missions: newGroup.requests.map(r => r.serial_number).join(', ')
-                    })
-                };
-                cmds.unshift(historyEntry);
-                if (typeof renderCmds === 'function') renderCmds();
-
-                try {
-                    await fetch(\`\${API_BASE}/commands\`, {
-                        method: 'POST',
-                        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
-                        body: JSON.stringify({
-                            group_id: assignType === 'group' ? targetId : null,
-                            target_user_id: assignType === 'individual' ? targetId : null,
-                            command_type: 'group',
-                            priority: newGroup.priority.toLowerCase(),
-                            command_payload: {
-                                name: name,
-                                message: \`Proceed to Tactical Cluster: \${name}\`,
-                                lat: newGroup.requests.length > 0 ? parseFloat(newGroup.requests[0].lat) : 0,
-                                lng: newGroup.requests.length > 0 ? parseFloat(newGroup.requests[0].lng) : 0,
-                                is_group_mission: true,
-                                request_ids: selectedIds,
-                                serial_numbers: newGroup.requests.map(r => r.serial_number),
-                                custom_polygon: customGroupPolygon,

-        function getConvexHull(points) {
-            if (points.length <= 2) return points;
-            const pts = points.slice().sort((a, b) => a[0] !== b[0] ? a[0] - b[0] : a[1] - b[1]);
-            const cross = (o, a, b) => (a[0] - o[0]) * (b[1] - o[1]) - (a[1] - o[1]) * (b[0] - o[0]);
-            const lower = [];
-            for (let i = 0; i < pts.length; i++) {
-                while (lower.length >= 2 && cross(lower[lower.length - 2], lower[lower.length - 1], pts[i]) <= 0) lower.pop();
-                lower.push(pts[i]);
-            }
-            const upper = [];
-            for (let i = pts.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
-                while (upper.length >= 2 && cross(upper[upper.length - 2], upper[upper.length - 1], pts[i]) <= 0) upper.pop();
-                upper.push(pts[i]);
-            }
-            upper.pop();
-            lower.pop();
-            return lower.concat(upper);
-        }
-
-        function generateTacticalPolygon(coords) {
-            if (!coords || coords.length === 0) return [];
-
-            const offset = 0.0001; // ~10 meters
-
-            if (coords.length >= 3) {
-                const hull = getConvexHull(coords);
-                // Expand hull by 10 meters outwards from the center
-                const centerLat = hull.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p[0], 0) / hull.length;
-                const centerLng = hull.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p[1], 0) / hull.length;
-
-                return hull.map(p => {
-                    const dLat = p[0] - centerLat;
-                    const dLng = p[1] - centerLng;
-                    const dist = Math.sqrt(dLat * dLat + dLng * dLng);
-                    if (dist === 0) return [p[0] + offset, p[1] + offset];
-                    const ratio = (dist + offset) / dist;
-                    return [centerLat + dLat * ratio, centerLng + dLng * ratio];
-                });
-            }
-            if (coords.length === 2) {
-                const bounds = L.latLngBounds(coords);
-                const n = bounds.getNorth() + offset;
-                const s = bounds.getSouth() - offset;
-                const e = bounds.getEast() + offset;
-                const w = bounds.getWest() - offset;
-                return [
-                    [n, w],
-                    [n, e],
-                    [s, e],
-                    [s, w]
-                ];
-            }
-            if (coords.length === 1) {
-                const lat = coords[0][0];
-                const lng = coords[0][1];
-                return [
-                    [lat + offset, lng - offset],
-                    [lat + offset, lng + offset],
-                    [lat - offset, lng + offset],
-                    [lat - offset, lng - offset]
-                ];
-            }
-            return [];
-        }

-        function drawGroupPerimeter(group) {
-            if (groupPerimeters[group.id]) map.removeLayer(groupPerimeters[group.id]);
-
-            const coords = group.requests.map(r => [parseFloat(r.lat), parseFloat(r.lng)]).filter(c => !isNaN(c[0]));
-            if (coords.length === 0) return;
-
-            let isDiluted = group.status === 'Closed' || group.status === 'Completed' || group.status === 'completed';
-            let style = {
-                color: isDiluted ? '#9ca3af' : '#a855f7',
-                fillColor: isDiluted ? '#9ca3af' : '#a855f7',
-                fillOpacity: isDiluted ? 0.05 : 0.15,
-                dashArray: isDiluted ? '2, 4' : '5, 8',
-                weight: isDiluted ? 1.5 : 2.5
-            };
-
-            const hull = group.custom_polygon || generateTacticalPolygon(coords);
-            groupPerimeters[group.id] = L.polygon(hull, style).addTo(map);
-
-            let assignedTo = group.status === 'Unassigned' ? 'Unassigned' : (group.assigned_to || 'Assigned');
-
-            groupPerimeters[group.id].bindPopup(\`
-                <div style="font-family:'Inter'; padding:5px; text-align:center;">
-                    <b style="color:\${isDiluted ? '#9ca3af' : 'var(--special)'}; font-size:14px;">\${group.name}</b><br>
-                    <span style="font-size:11px; color:var(--text-muted);">\${group.requests.length} Requests Clustered</span><br>
-                    <span style="font-size:11px; color:var(--text-main); font-weight:600;">Status: \${group.status}</span><br>
-                    <span style="font-size:11px; color:var(--primary); font-weight:600;">Team: \${assignedTo}</span><br>
-                    \${!isDiluted ? \`<button class="btn btn-primary" style="width:100%; margin-top:8px; padding:4px; font-size:10px;" onclick="openMgmtDetail('\${group.id}', true); switchPage('notif-mgmt');">View Group Details</button>\` : ''}
-                </div>
-            \`);
-        }

-            const type = currentBulkAssignType;
-            const targetId = type === 'group' ? document.getElementById('bulkGroupSelect').value : document.getElementById('bulkIndivSelect').value;

-

-                alert("ERROR: No missions selected or selection list was updated in the background. Please close this pane, select the tasks again, and click Group & Assign.");

-                alert("Operational requirement: Provide a group name and select a field target (Group or Individual).");

-    const SIREN = '';

-    window.stopAdminSound = function() {

-            window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage(JSON.stringify({type: 'PLAY_SOUND', sound: type}));

-
-            if(duration) {

-            }
-        }
-    };

*/\r\n        #operationalHub {\r\n            display: flex;\r\n            flex-direction: row;\r\n            align-items: stretch;\r\n            width: 100vw;\r\n            height: 100vh;\r\n            background: var(--bg-body);\r\n            overflow: hidden;\r\n            position: fixed;\r\n            top: 0;\r\n            left: 0;\r\n            z-index: 9999;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .hub-side-panel {\r\n            width: 30% !important;\r\n            min-width: 360px !important;\r\n            height: 100vh !important;\r\n            background: white !important;\r\n            border-right: 1px solid var(--border) !important;\r\n            display: flex !important;\r\n            flex-direction: column !important;\r\n            justify-content: space-between !important;\r\n            padding: 80px 48px !important;\r\n            box-shadow: 20px 0 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02) !important;\r\n            z-index: 10;\r\n            border-radius: 0 !important;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .hub-main-content {\r\n            flex: 1 !important;\r\n            height: 100vh !important;\r\n            display: flex !important;\r\n            flex-direction: column !important;\r\n            background: var(--bg-body) !important;\r\n            overflow-y: auto !important;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .hub-content-inner {\r\n            max-width: 1100px;\r\n            width: 100%;\r\n            margin: 0 auto;\r\n            padding: 80px 60px;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .tracking-pulse-line {\r\n            animation: dashPulse 2s linear infinite;\r\n            stroke-dasharray: 10, 15;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        @keyframes dashPulse {\r\n            to {\r\n                stroke-dashoffset: -25;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n    </style>\r\n\r\n    <!-- OFFLINE SYNC ENGINE -->\r\n    <script>\r\n        (function() {\r\n            const CACHE_PREFIX = 'ardms_cache_';\r\n            const QUEUE_KEY = 'ardms_sync_queue';\r\n            \r\n            const originalFetch = window.fetch;\r\n            \r\n            // Helper to save requests\r\n            function enqueueRequest(url, options) {\r\n                const queue = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(QUEUE_KEY) || '[]');\r\n                queue.push({\r\n                    id: Date.now().toString(),\r\n                    url,\r\n                    options: {\r\n                        method: options.method,\r\n                        headers: options.headers,\r\n                        body: options.body\r\n                    },\r\n                    timestamp: Date.now()\r\n                });\r\n                localStorage.setItem(QUEUE_KEY, JSON.stringify(queue));\r\n                console.log('[Sync Engine] Queued offline request:', url);\r\n                if (typeof showAdminToast === 'function') {\r\n                    showAdminToast('Offline: Command queued for sync', 'warning');\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            // Sync Queue Process\r\n            async function processSyncQueue() {\r\n                if (!navigator.onLine) return;\r\n                const queue = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(QUEUE_KEY) || '[]');\r\n                if (queue.length === 0) return;\r\n                \r\n                console.log(\\`[Sync Engine] Processing \\${queue.length} queued requests...\\`);\r\n                \r\n                let successCount = 0;\r\n                let newQueue = [...queue];\r\n                \r\n                for (let i = 0; i < queue.length; i++) {\r\n                    const req = queue[i];\r\n                    try {\r\n                        const res = await originalFetch(req.url, req.options);\r\n                        if (res.ok) {\r\n                            successCount++;\r\n                            newQueue = newQueue.filter(r => r.id !== req.id);\r\n                        } else {\r\n                            // If server responded with error, we still remove it so we don't infinitely retry bad requests,\r\n                            // UNLESS it's a 502/503/504 indicating the server is actually down.\r\n                            if (res.status >= 500) throw new Error(\"Server down\");\r\n                            newQueue = newQueue.filter(r => r.id !== req.id);\r\n                        }\r\n                    } catch (e) {\r\n                        console.warn('[Sync Engine] Queue sync failed for', req.url, e);\r\n                        break; // Stop processing, network still bad\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                localStorage.setItem(QUEUE_KEY, JSON.stringify(newQueue));\r\n                if (successCount > 0 && typeof showAdminToast === 'function') {\r\n                    showAdminToast(\\`Reconnected: Synced \\${successCount} offline command(s) to Web Admin server\\`, 'success');\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            // Hook global fetch\r\n            window.fetch = async function(url, options = {}) {\r\n                const method = options.method || 'GET';\r\n                const isApi = typeof url === 'string' && url.includes('/api/');\r\n                \r\n                if (!navigator.onLine && isApi) {\r\n                    if (method === 'GET') {\r\n                        const cached = localStorage.getItem(CACHE_PREFIX + url);\r\n                        if (cached) {\r\n                            console.log('[Sync Engine] Serving from cache:', url);\r\n                            return new Response(cached, { status: 200, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } });\r\n                        }\r\n                        throw new TypeError(\"Failed to fetch\");\r\n                    } else {\r\n                        enqueueRequest(url, options);\r\n                        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ success: true, queued: true, message: 'Saved offline' }), { status: 200, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } });\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                try {\r\n                    const response = await originalFetch(url, options);\r\n                    \r\n                    if (isApi && response.ok) {\r\n                        if (method === 'GET') {\r\n                            const clone = response.clone();\r\n                            const text = await clone.text();\r\n                            localStorage.setItem(CACHE_PREFIX + url, text);\r\n                        }\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n                    return response;\r\n                } catch (e) {\r\n                    if (isApi) {\r\n                        if (method === 'GET') {\r\n                            const cached = localStorage.getItem(CACHE_PREFIX + url);\r\n                            if (cached) {\r\n                                console.log('[Sync Engine] Serving from cache (network failed):', url);\r\n                                return new Response(cached, { status: 200, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } });\r\n                            }\r\n                        } else {\r\n                            enqueueRequest(url, options);\r\n                            return new Response(JSON.stringify({ success: true, queued: true, message: 'Saved offline' }), { status: 200, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } });\r\n                        }\r\n                    }\r\n                    throw e;\r\n                }\r\n            };\r\n\r\n            window.addEventListener('online', () => {\r\n                setTimeout(processSyncQueue, 1500);\r\n            });\r\n\r\n            setInterval(() => {\r\n                if (navigator.onLine) processSyncQueue();\r\n            }, 10000);\r\n\r\n        })();\r\n    </script>\r\n\r\n<script>\r\n// --- OFFLINE SYNC WRAPPER ---\r\n(function() {\r\n    const originalFetch = window.fetch;\r\n    window.offlineQueue = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('adminOfflineQueue') || '[]');\r\n\r\n    function saveQueue() {\r\n        localStorage.setItem('adminOfflineQueue', JSON.stringify(window.offlineQueue));\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    async function processQueue() {\r\n        if (window.offlineQueue.length === 0) return;\r\n        console.log('[Offline Sync] Processing queue...', window.offlineQueue.length);\r\n        const queueToProcess = [...window.offlineQueue];\r\n        window.offlineQueue = [];\r\n        saveQueue();\r\n\r\n        let syncedCount = 0;\r\n        for (const item of queueToProcess) {\r\n            try {\r\n                await originalFetch(item.url, item.options);\r\n                console.log('[Offline Sync] Synced:', item.url);\r\n                syncedCount++;\r\n            } catch (e) {\r\n                console.error('[Offline Sync] Failed to sync, requeueing:', item.url);\r\n                window.offlineQueue.push(item);\r\n                saveQueue();\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        if (syncedCount > 0 && window.ReactNativeWebView) {\r\n             window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage(JSON.stringify({ type: 'OFFLINE_SYNCED', count: syncedCount }));\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    window.fetch = async function(url, options) {\r\n        // Only intercept modifying requests\r\n        if (options && ['POST', 'PUT', 'DELETE'].includes(options.method)) {\r\n            try {\r\n                const response = await originalFetch(url, options);\r\n                // If successful, try processing anything that was queued\r\n                processQueue();\r\n                return response;\r\n            } catch (error) {\r\n                console.warn('[Offline Sync] Network failed. Queuing request:', url);\r\n                window.offlineQueue.push({ url, options });\r\n                saveQueue();\r\n                if (window.ReactNativeWebView) {\r\n                    window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage(JSON.stringify({ type: 'OFFLINE_QUEUED', length: window.offlineQueue.length }));\r\n                }\r\n                // Return a mock successful response so the UI doesn't break\r\n                return new Response(JSON.stringify({ success: true, queued: true }), {\r\n                    status: 200,\r\n                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        return originalFetch(url, options);\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // Listen for online events\r\n    window.addEventListener('online', processQueue);\r\n    \r\n    // Also try processing queue on load\r\n    setTimeout(processQueue, 2000);\r\n})();\r\n</script>\r\n\r\n</head>\r\n\r\n<body>\r\n    <!-- OPERATIONS LANDING PAGE -->\r\n    <div id=\"operationalHub\">\r\n        <!-- Left Side: Brand & Identity (30%) -->\r\n        <div class=\"hub-side-panel\">\r\n            <div>\r\n                <!-- Brand Header -->\r\n                <div style=\"margin-bottom: 48px;\">\r\n                    <div\r\n                        style=\"width: 80px; || window.location.protocol === 'https:') ? window.location.hostname : '127.0.0.1');\r\n        const API_BASE = \\`http://\\${SERVER_IP}:3001/api\\`;\r\n\r\n        function formatMediaUrl(url) {\r\n            if (!url) return '';\r\n            if (url.startsWith('http://') || url.startsWith('https://') || url.startsWith('data:')) return url;\r\n            const base = \\`http://\\${SERVER_IP}:3001\\`;\r\n            return \\`\\${base}\\${url}\\`;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // Timezone conversion helpers\r\n        function formatLocalTime(dbTimeStr) {\r\n            if (!dbTimeStr) return '--:--';\r\n            let t = dbTimeStr.trim();\r\n            if (!t.includes('T')) t = t.replace(' ', 'T');\r\n            if (!t.endsWith('Z') && !t.includes('+')) t += 'Z';\r\n            try {\r\n                const d = new Date(t);\r\n                if (isNaN(d)) return dbTimeStr;\r\n                let h = d.getHours();\r\n                let m = d.getMinutes();\r\n                const ampm = h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';\r\n                h = h % 12;\r\n                h = h ? h : 12;\r\n                m = m < 10 ? '0' + m : m;\r\n                return h + ':' + m + ' ' + ampm;\r\n            } catch(e) { return dbTimeStr; }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function formatLocalDate(dbTimeStr) {\r\n            if (!dbTimeStr) return '--/--/----';\r\n            let t = dbTimeStr.trim();\r\n            if (!t.includes('T')) t = t.replace(' ', 'T');\r\n            if (!t.endsWith('Z') && !t.includes('+')) t += 'Z';\r\n            try {\r\n                const d = new Date(t);\r\n                if (isNaN(d)) return dbTimeStr;\r\n                return d.toLocaleString();\r\n            } catch(e) { return dbTimeStr; }\r\n        }\r\n        let operations = [];\r\n        let rescueRequests = [];\r\n        let rawCmds = [];\r\n        let globalZones = [];\r\n        let globalRescuers = [];\r\n        let cmds = [];\r\n        let currentUsers = [];\r\n        let currentActiveOp = null;\r\n        let groupedTasks = []; // Global state for tactical groups\r\n        let groupPerimeters = {}; // Map layers for group boundaries\r\n        window.bulkSelectedIds = [];\r\n        try {\r\n            const cachedSel = sessionStorage.getItem('rescue_bulkSelectedIds');\r\n            if (cachedSel) {\r\n                window.bulkSelectedIds = JSON.parse(cachedSel);\r\n            }\r\n        } catch (e) { console.error(\"Error reading bulkSelectedIds cache:\", e); }\r\n        lucide.createIcons();\r\n\r\n        // 0. WebSocket & Global Helpers\r\n        let socket;\r\n        function updateBadge(connected) {\r\n            const badge1 = document.getElementById('adminConnectionBadge');\r\n            const badge2 = document.getElementById('configConnectionBadge');\r\n            const dot3 = document.getElementById('headerConnectionDot');\r\n            const text3 = document.getElementById('headerConnectionText');\r\n            const color = connected ? '#10b981' : '#ef4444';\r\n            const text = connected ? 'CONNECTED' : 'DISCONNECTED';\r\n            if (window.ReactNativeWebView) { window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage(JSON.stringify({ type: 'WS_STATUS', connected: connected })); }\r\n            const html = \\`<span style=\"width:6px; height:6px; background:\\${color}; border-radius:50%; display:inline-block;\"></span> \\${text}\\`;\r\n            if (badge1) {\r\n                badge1.innerHTML = html;\r\n                badge1.style.color = color;\r\n            }\r\n            if (badge2) {\r\n                badge2.innerHTML = html;\r\n                badge2.style.color = color;\r\n            }\r\n            if (dot3) {\r\n                dot3.style.background = color;\r\n                dot3.style.boxShadow = `0 0 6px ${color}`;\r\n            }\r\n            if (text3) {\r\n                text3.innerText = text;\r\n                text3.style.color = color;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        let reconnectDelay = 1000;\r\n        let heartbeatInterval = null;\r\n\r\n        function initWebSocket() {\r\n            const wsUrl = `ws://${SERVER_IP}:3001`;\r\n            console.log(`[Admin] Connecting to WebSocket: ${wsUrl}`);\r\n            try {\r\n                if (socket) {\r\n                    socket.onclose = null;\r\n                    socket.onerror = null;\r\n                    socket.onmessage = null;\r\n                    socket.onopen = null;\r\n                    socket.close();\r\n                }\r\n                socket = new WebSocket(wsUrl);\r\n\r\n                socket.onopen = () => {\r\n                    console.log(\"[Admin] WebSocket Connected\");\r\n                    updateBadge(true);\r\n                    socket.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'REGISTER', deviceId: 'WEB_ADMIN_MASTER', room: 'admin' }));\r\n                    reconnectDelay = 1000; // reset delay on success\r\n                    refreshAllModules(); // auto-sync on reconnect\r\n                    \r\n                    if (heartbeatInterval) clearInterval(heartbeatInterval);\r\n                    heartbeatInterval = setInterval(() => {\r\n                        if (socket && socket.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN) {\r\n                            console.warn(\"[Admin] Heartbeat detected socket is not OPEN. Badge set to offline.\");\r\n                            updateBadge(false);\r\n                        } else {\r\n                            // Send a quick ping\r\n                            try { socket.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'PING' })); } catch(e) { updateBadge(false); }\r\n                        }\r\n                    }, 2000);\r\n                };\r\n                socket.onerror = () => {\r\n                    updateBadge(false);\r\n                };\r\n                socket.onclose = () => {\r\n                    console.log(`[Admin] WebSocket Closed. Reconnecting in ${reconnectDelay}ms...`);\r\n                    updateBadge(false);\r\n                    if (heartbeatInterval) clearInterval(heartbeatInterval);\r\n                    setTimeout(initWebSocket, reconnectDelay);\r\n                    reconnectDelay = Math.min(reconnectDelay * 2, 30000); // Exponential backoff max 30s\r\n                };\r\n                socket.onmessage = (event) => {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        const data = JSON.parse(event.data);\r\n                        const updateTypes = [\r\n                            'NEW_RESCUE_REQUEST', 'RESCUE_REQUEST_ACCEPTED', 'RESCUE_REQUEST_DECLINED',\r\n                            'RESCUE_REQUEST_UPDATE', 'COMMAND_STATUS_UPDATE', 'RESCUE_REQUEST_COMPLETED',\r\n                            'SOS_ALERT', 'RESCUER_UPDATE', 'NEW_COMMAND', 'AI_STATUS_UPDATE'\r\n                        ];\r\n\r\n                        if (data.type === 'AI_STATUS_UPDATE') {\r\n                            if (typeof updateAiUI === 'function') updateAiUI(data.data.enabled);\r\n                            return; // Only update UI, avoid full refresh\r\n                        }\r\n                        if (data.type === 'AI_ASSIGNED') {\r\n                            Swal.fire({\r\n                                icon: 'info',\r\n                                title: '≡ƒñû AI Task Reassignment',\r\n                                text: data.message,\r\n                                timer: 5000,\r\n                                timerProgressBar: true\r\n                            });\r\n                            if (window.currentSosAudio) { window.currentSosAudio.pause(); window.currentSosAudio.currentTime = 0; }\r\n                            closeModal('sosAlertModal');\r\n                            if (data.type === 'RESCUE_REQUEST_UPDATE' && data.data && data.data.status && data.data.status !== 'pending') {\r\n                                if (window.currentSosAudio) { window.currentSosAudio.pause(); window.currentSosAudio.currentTime = 0; }\r\n                                closeModal('sosAlertModal');\r\n                            }\r\n                            refreshAllModules(); // Refresh tasks\r\n                            return;\r\n                        }\r\n\r\nfunction toggleGlobalMute(muted) {\r\n    window.isMuted = muted;\r\n    const btn = document.getElementById('globalMuteBtn');\r\n    if (btn) {\r\n        btn.dataset.muted = window.isMuted.toString();\r\n        if (window.isMuted) {\r\n            btn.style.backgroundColor = \"#ef4444\"; // red\r\n            btn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide=\"volume-x\" style=\"width:18px; margin-right:6px;\"></i> SOUND OFF';\r\n        } else {\r\n            btn.style.backgroundColor = \"#22c55e\"; // green\r\n            btn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide=\"volume-2\" style=\"width:18px; margin-right:6px;\"></i> SOUND ON';\r\n        }\r\n        if (window.lucide) window.lucide.createIcons();\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n                        if (data.type === 'RESCUE_REQUEST_DECLINED_REASSIGN') {\r\n                            Swal.fire({\r\n                                icon: 'warning',\r\n                                title: 'Rescuer Declined Task',\r\n                                text: 'A rescuer has declined the task. The AI Engine is now searching for the next nearest available unit...',\r\n                                timer: 4000,\r\n                                timerProgressBar: true\r\n                            });\r\n                        }\r\n                        if (updateTypes.includes(data.type)) {\r\n                            if (['RESCUE_REQUEST_ACCEPTED', 'RESCUE_REQUEST_COMPLETED', 'RESCUE_REQUEST_IN_PROGRESS'].includes(data.type)) {\r\n                                if (window.currentSosAudio) { window.currentSosAudio.pause(); window.currentSosAudio.currentTime = 0; }\r\n                                closeModal('sosAlertModal');\r\n                            }\r\n                            if (data.type === 'RESCUE_REQUEST_UPDATE' && data.data && data.data.status && data.data.status !== 'pending') {\r\n                                if (window.currentSosAudio) { window.currentSosAudio.pause(); window.currentSosAudio.currentTime = 0; }\r\n                                closeModal('sosAlertModal');\r\n                            }\r\n                            if (data.type === 'NEW_RESCUE_REQUEST' || data.type === 'SOS_ALERT') {\r\n                                showAdminToast(\\`≡ƒÜ¿ SOS/Emergency Alert from \\${data.data?.sector || 'field'}!\\`, 'error');\r\n                                showSosAlertModal(data.data);\r\n                                // Play standard HTML5 beep/siren sound and loop it\r\n                                if (window.currentSosAudio) { window.currentSosAudio.pause(); }\r\n                                window.currentSosAudio = new Audio('data:audio/mp3;base64,//NExAAAAANIAAAAAExBTUUzLjEwMKqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq');\r\n                                window.currentSosAudio.loop = true;\r\n                                window.currentSosAudio.play().catch(e => console.log('Audio play failed: ', e));\r\n                            } else if (data.type === 'RESCUE_REQUEST_COMPLETED') {\r\n                                showAdminToast(\\`Γ£à Mission complete: \\${data.data?.sector || 'request'} marked done\\`);\r\n                            }\r\n\r\n                            refreshAllModules();\r\n                        } else if (data.type === 'LIVE_LOCATION_UPDATE') {\r\n                            if (globalRescuers) {\r\n                                const existing = globalRescuers.find(r => r.device_id === data.data.deviceId || r.phone === data.data.deviceId);\r\n                                if (existing) {\r\n                                    existing.lat = data.data.lat;\r\n                                    existing.lng = data.data.lng;\r\n                                } else {\r\n                                    globalRescuers.push({\r\n                                        device_id: data.data.deviceId,\r\n                                        name: data.data.name,\r\n                                        lat: data.data.lat,\r\n                                        lng: data.data.lng\r\n                                    });\r\n                                }\r\n                                if (typeof updateTacticalMap === 'function') updateTacticalMap(false);\r\n                            }\r\n                        }\r\n                    } catch (e) { console.error(\"[Admin] WS Error:\", e); }\r\n                };\r\n            } catch (e) {\r\n                updateBadge(false);\r\n                setTimeout(initWebSocket, 5000);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // --- GLOBAL REFRESH & SYNC HUB ---\r\n        function refreshAllModules() {\r\n            console.log(\"[SYSTEM] Executing Global Sync...\");\r\n            if (typeof fetchRescueRequests === 'function') fetchRescueRequests();\r\n            if (typeof fetchCommands === 'function') fetchCommands();\r\n            if (typeof fetchDashboardStats === 'function') fetchDashboardStats();\r\n            if (typeof updateTacticalMap === 'function') updateTacticalMap(true);\r\n            if (typeof updateMgmtPage === 'function') updateMgmtPage();\r\n            if (typeof updateNotifBadges === 'function') updateNotifBadges();\r\n            if (typeof fetchUsers === 'function') fetchUsers();\r\n            if (typeof fetchGroups === 'function') fetchGroups();\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function showAdminToast(msg, type = 'info') {\r\n            if (type === 'error' || type === 'warning') { window.playAdminSound('siren'); }\r\n            else if (msg && (msg.toLowerCase().includes('updat') || msg.toLowerCase().includes('save') || msg.toLowerCase().includes('set') || msg.toLowerCase().includes('chang'))) { window.playAdminSound('config'); }\r\n            else { window.playAdminSound('config'); }\r\n\r\n            const toast = document.getElementById('adminToast');\r\n            const toastMsg = document.getElementById('adminToastMsg');\r\n            if (toastMsg) toastMsg.innerText = msg;\r\n            else toast.innerText = msg;\r\n\r\n            if (type === 'success') {\r\n                toast.style.backgroundColor = '#10b981';\r\n            } else if (type === 'error') {\r\n                toast.style.backgroundColor = '#ef4444';\r\n            } else {\r\n                toast.style.backgroundColor = '#1e293b';\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            toast.classList.add('show');\r\n            clearTimeout(toast._timeout);\r\n            toast._timeout = setTimeout(() => {\r\n                toast.classList.remove('show');\r\n            }, 3000);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 0. Landing Page Logic\r\n        // 0. Landing Page Logic (Consolidated)\r\n        async function fetchOperations() {\r\n            try {\r\n                const res = await fetch(\\`\\${API_BASE}/operations\\`);\r\n                operations = await res.json();\r\n                renderOpsList();\r\n\r\n                // Restoration logic\r\n                const savedOpId = sessionStorage.getItem('active_op_id');\r\n                if (savedOpId && !currentActiveOp) {\r\n                    const op = operations.find(o => o.id === savedOpId);\r\n                    if (op) {\r\n                        console.log(\"[SYSTEM] Restoring session:\", savedOpId);\r\n                        enterDashboard(savedOpId);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            } catch (e) {\r\n                console.error(\"Error fetching operations\", e);\r\n                const body = document.getElementById('opsListBody');\r\n                if (body) {\r\n                    body.innerHTML = \\`<tr><td colspan=\"5\" style=\"padding:40px; text-align:center; color:var(--danger); font-size:14px; font-weight:800; line-height:1.6;\">\r\n                        ΓÜá∩╕Å CONNECTION FAILED to backend server at \\${API_BASE}.<br>\r\n                        <span style=\"font-size:12px; font-weight:600; color:var(--text-muted); display:block; margin-top:8px;\">\r\n                            Please verify the backend is running. If you are running the system on this laptop, reset connection settings to Localhost.\r\n                        </span>\r\n                        <a href=\"#\" onclick=\"resetAdminServerIp(); return false;\" style=\"display:inline-block; margin-top:12px; background:var(--accent); color:white; padding:8px 16px; border-radius:8px; text-decoration:none; font-family:sans-serif; font-size:13px; font-weight:700;\">\r\n                            ΓåÉ Reset Connection to Localhost\r\n                        </a>\r\n                    </td></tr>\\`;\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function renderOpsList() {\r\n            const body = document.getElementById('opsListBody');\r\n            if (!body) return;\r\n            body.innerHTML = '';\r\n            if (!operations || operations.length === 0) {\r\n                body.innerHTML = \\`<tr><td colspan=\"5\" style=\"padding:40px; text-align:center; color:var(--text-muted); font-size:14px; font-weight:600;\">No active operations found. Create your first operation to begin.</td></tr>\\`;\r\n                return;\r\n            }\r\n            operations.forEach(op => {\r\n                const row = document.createElement('tr');\r\n                row.style.borderBottom = '1px solid var(--border)';\r\n                row.style.cursor = 'pointer';\r\n                row.onclick = () => enterDashboard(op.id);\r\n                row.innerHTML = \\`\r\n                    <td style=\"padding: 20px 24px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-muted);\">\\${op.id}</td>\r\n                    <td style=\"padding: 20px 24px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-main);\">\\${op.name}</td>\r\n                    <td style=\"padding: 20px 24px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-muted);\">\\${op.date}</td>\r\n                    <td style=\"padding: 20px 24px;\">\r\n                        <span class=\"status-badge\" style=\"background: rgba(34,197,94,0.1); color: #16a34a; font-weight: 800; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 12px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;\">\r\n                            <span style=\"width: 8px; height: 8px; background: #22c55e; border-radius: 50%; display: block;\"></span>\r\n                            \\${op.status || 'Active'}\r\n                        </span>\r\n                    </td>\r\n                    <td style=\"padding: 20px 24px; text-align: right; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 8px;\">\r\n                        <button class=\"btn btn-primary\" style=\"padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 10px; font-weight: 700; font-size:12px;\">\r\n                            DASHBOARD\r\n                        </button>\r\n                        <button class=\"btn\" onclick=\"event.stopPropagation(); openEditOpModal('\\${op.id}')\" style=\"background:rgba(37,99,235,0.1); color:var(--accent); border:none; padding:8px 12px; border-radius:10px; font-weight:800; font-size:12px;\">\r\n                            EDIT\r\n                        </button>\r\n                        <button class=\"btn\" onclick=\"event.stopPropagation(); deleteOperation('\\${op.id}')\" style=\"background:rgba(239,68,68,0.1); color:var(--danger); border:none; padding:8px 12px; border-radius:10px; font-weight:800; font-size:12px;\">\r\n                            DELETE\r\n                        </button>\r\n                    </td>\r\n                \\`;\r\n                body.appendChild(row);\r\n            });\r\n            lucide.createIcons();\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        let isEditingOp = false;\r\n        let editingOpId = null;\r\n\r\n        async function saveOperation() {\r\n            let name = document.getElementById('newOpName').value;\r\n            if (!name) { alert(\"Please enter an operation name.\"); return; }\r\n            if (!opDrawnLayer) { alert(\"Please mark the operation zone on the map.\"); return; }\r\n\r\n            let zoneData = null;\r\n            if (opDrawMode === 'radius') {\r\n                zoneData = { type: 'radius', latlng: opDrawnLayer.getLatLng(), radius: opDrawnLayer.getRadius() };\r\n            } else {\r\n                zoneData = { type: 'area', bounds: opDrawnLayer.getBounds() };\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            try {\r\n                if (isEditingOp) {\r\n                    await fetch(\\`\\${API_BASE}/operations/\\${editingOpId}\\`, {\r\n                        method: 'PUT',\r\n                        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\r\n                        body: JSON.stringify({ name: name, zoneData: zoneData })\r\n                    });\r\n                    showAdminToast(\\`Operation \\${editingOpId} updated successfully\\`);\r\n                } else {\r\n                    let d = new Date();\r\n                    let ds = d.toISOString().split('T')[0];\r\n                    let newId = document.getElementById('opSerial').value;\r\n                    await fetch(\\`\\${API_BASE}/operations\\`, {\r\n                        method: 'POST',\r\n                        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\r\n                        body: JSON.stringify({ id: newId, name: name, date: ds, zoneData: zoneData })\r\n                    });\r\n                    showAdminToast(\\`Operation \\${newId} created successfully\\`);\r\n                }\r\n                fetchOperations();\r\n                closeModal('createOpModal');\r\n            } catch (e) { alert(\\`Failed to save operation: \\${e.message}\\\\nIs the backend running at \\${API_BASE}?\\`); }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        async function deleteOperation(opId) {\r\n            if (!confirm(\\`Are you sure you want to delete Operation \\${opId}?\\`)) return;\r\n            try {\r\n                await fetch(\\`\\${API_BASE}/operations/\\${opId}\\`, { method: 'DELETE' });\r\n                if (currentActiveOp && currentActiveOp.id === opId) {\r\n                    sessionStorage.removeItem('active_op_id');\r\n                    location.reload();\r\n                } else {\r\n                    fetchOperations();\r\n                }\r\n                showAdminToast(\\`Operation \\${opId} deleted\\`);\r\n            } catch (e) { console.error(\"Delete failed\", e); }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        let opMapInstance;\r\n        let opDrawnLayer;\r\n        let opDrawMode = 'radius';\r\n        let opIsDrawing = false;\r\n        let opStartPoint = null;\r\n\r\n        function initOpMap() {\r\n            if (opMapInstance) return;\r\n            opMapInstance = L.map('opMap', { zoomControl: false }).setView([13.0827, 80.2707], 12);\r\n            L.tileLayer('https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/rastertiles/voyager/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png').addTo(opMapInstance);\r\n            L.control.zoom({ position: 'bottomright' }).addTo(opMapInstance);\r\n            opMapInstance.on('mousedown', onOpMapClick);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function returnToOpsHub() {\r\n            currentActiveOp = null;\r\n            sessionStorage.removeItem('active_op_id');\r\n            document.getElementById('operationalHub').style.display = 'flex';\r\n            document.querySelector('.top-nav').style.display = 'none';\r\n            document.getElementById('appWrapper').style.display = 'none';\r\n            fetchOperations();\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function openMainFeedSettingsModal() {\r\n            document.getElementById('mainFeedSettingsModal').style.display = 'flex';\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function handleLogoUpload(event) {\r\n            const file = event.target.files[0];\r\n            if (file) {\r\n                const reader = new FileReader();\r\n                reader.onload = function (e) {\r\n                    document.getElementById('sysLogoInput').value = e.target.result;\r\n                };\r\n                reader.readAsDataURL(file);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        async function saveMainFeedSettings() {\r\n            const newName = document.getElementById('sysNameInput').value;\r\n            const newLogo = document.getElementById('sysLogoInput').value;\r\n            const newCommander = document.getElementById('sysCommanderInput').value;\r\n\r\n            try {\r\n                if (newName) {\r\n                    await fetch(\\`\\${API_BASE}/settings\\`, { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ key: 'system_name', value: newName }) });\r\n                    document.getElementById('landingTitle').innerHTML = newName.replace(' ', '<br>');\r\n                    document.getElementById('navBrandTitle').innerText = newName.toUpperCase();\r\n                }\r\n                if (newCommander) {\r\n                    await fetch(\\`\\${API_BASE}/settings\\`, { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ key: 'commander_name', value: newCommander }) });\r\n                }\r\n                if (newLogo) {\r\n                    await fetch(\\`\\${API_BASE}/settings\\`, { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ key: 'system_logo', value: newLogo }) });\r\n                    document.getElementById('landingLogoImg').src = newLogo;\r\n                    document.getElementById('landingLogoImg').style.display = 'block';\r\n                    document.getElementById('landingLogoIcon').style.display = 'none';\r\n                } else if (newLogo === '') {\r\n                    document.getElementById('landingLogoImg').style.display = 'none';\r\n                    document.getElementById('landingLogoIcon').style.display = 'inline-block';\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                closeModal('mainFeedSettingsModal');\r\n                showAdminToast('System profile saved and broadcasted across network successfully.');\r\n            } catch (e) {\r\n                console.error(e);\r\n                alert('Error saving system profile');\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function openCreateOpModal() {\r\n            isEditingOp = false;\r\n            editingOpId = null;\r\n            document.getElementById('opModalTitle').innerText = \"Create New Operation\";\r\n            document.getElementById('saveOpBtn').innerText = \"Save & Create\";\r\n            document.getElementById('createOpModal').style.display = 'flex';\r\n            document.getElementById('newOpName').value = '';\r\n            document.getElementById('opZoneText').value = '';\r\n\r\n            // Generate Serial and Time\r\n            let newId = \\`OP-\\${String(operations.length + 1).padStart(2, '0')}\\`;\r\n            let d = new Date();\r\n            document.getElementById('opSerial').value = newId;\r\n            document.getElementById('opTime').value = d.toLocaleString();\r\n\r\n            if (opDrawnLayer && opMapInstance) opMapInstance.removeLayer(opDrawnLayer);\r\n            opDrawnLayer = null;\r\n            setTimeout(() => {\r\n                initOpMap();\r\n                opMapInstance.invalidateSize();\r\n            }, 100);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function openEditOpModal(opId) {\r\n            const op = operations.find(o => o.id === opId);\r\n            if (!op) return;\r\n\r\n            isEditingOp = true;\r\n            editingOpId = opId;\r\n            document.getElementById('opModalTitle').innerText = \"Edit Operation: \" + opId;\r\n            document.getElementById('saveOpBtn').innerText = \"Update Operation\";\r\n            document.getElementById('createOpModal').style.display = 'flex';\r\n            document.getElementById('newOpName').value = op.name;\r\n            document.getElementById('opSerial').value = op.id;\r\n            document.getElementById('opTime').value = op.date;\r\n\r\n            if (opDrawnLayer && opMapInstance) opMapInstance.removeLayer(opDrawnLayer);\r\n            opDrawnLayer = null;\r\n\r\n            setTimeout(() => {\r\n                initOpMap();\r\n                opMapInstance.invalidateSize();\r\n\r\n                // Restore zone on map\r\n                if (op.zoneData) {\r\n                    if (op.zoneData.type === 'radius') {\r\n                        setOpDrawMode('radius');\r\n                        opDrawnLayer = L.circle(op.zoneData.latlng, { radius: op.zoneData.radius, color: '#2563eb' }).addTo(opMapInstance);\r\n                        document.getElementById('opZoneText').value = \\`Radius: \\${Math.round(op.zoneData.radius)}m at \\${op.zoneData.latlng.lat.toFixed(4)}, \\${op.zoneData.latlng.lng.toFixed(4)}\\`;\r\n                    } else if (op.zoneData.type === 'area') {\r\n                        setOpDrawMode('area');\r\n                        opDrawnLayer = L.rectangle(op.zoneData.bounds, { color: '#2563eb' }).addTo(opMapInstance);\r\n                        document.getElementById('opZoneText').value = \"Polygon Area Defined\";\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            }, 100);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function setOpDrawMode(mode) {\r\n            opDrawMode = mode;\r\n            document.getElementById('btnOpRad').classList.remove('active');\r\n            document.getElementById('btnOpArea').classList.remove('active');\r\n            document.getElementById(mode === 'radius' ? 'btnOpRad' : 'btnOpArea').classList.add('active');\r\n            if (opMapInstance) opMapInstance.getContainer().style.cursor = 'crosshair';\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function onOpMapClick(e) {\r\n            if (opIsDrawing) return;\r\n            opMapInstance.dragging.disable();\r\n            opIsDrawing = true;\r\n            opStartPoint = e.latlng;\r\n            if (opDrawnLayer) opMapInstance.removeLayer(opDrawnLayer);\r\n\r\n            let style = { color: '#ef4444', weight: 2, fillOpacity: 0.1, dashArray: '5, 5' };\r\n            if (opDrawMode === 'radius') {\r\n                opDrawnLayer = L.circle(opStartPoint, { ...style, radius: 0 }).addTo(opMapInstance);\r\n            } else {\r\n                opDrawnLayer = L.rectangle([opStartPoint, opStartPoint], style).addTo(opMapInstance);\r\n            }\r\n            opDrawnLayer.bindTooltip(\"Operation Zone\", { permanent: true, direction: \"center\", className: 'op-zone-tooltip' }).openTooltip();\r\n\r\n            opMapInstance.on('mousemove', onOpMapMove);\r\n            opMapInstance.on('mouseup', onOpMapUp);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function onOpMapMove(e) {\r\n            if (!opIsDrawing) return;\r\n            if (opDrawMode === 'radius') {\r\n                opDrawnLayer.setRadius(opMapInstance.distance(opStartPoint, e.latlng));\r\n            } else {\r\n                opDrawnLayer.setBounds([opStartPoint, e.latlng]);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function onOpMapUp(e) {\r\n            opIsDrawing = false;\r\n            opMapInstance.dragging.enable();\r\n            opMapInstance.off('mousemove', onOpMapMove);\r\n            opMapInstance.off('mouseup', onOpMapUp);\r\n            opMapInstance.getContainer().style.cursor = '';\r\n\r\n            if (opDrawnLayer) {\r\n                let bounds = opDrawnLayer.getBounds();\r\n                let center = bounds.getCenter();\r\n                let radStr = opDrawMode === 'radius' ? \\` (Radius: \\${(opDrawnLayer.getRadius() / 1000).toFixed(2)}km)\\` : '';\r\n                document.getElementById('opZoneText').value = \\`Center: Lat \\${center.lat.toFixed(4)}, Lng \\${center.lng.toFixed(4)}\\${radStr}\\`;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n\r\n        let activeMacroZoneLayer = null;\r\n\r\n        function enterDashboard(opId) {\r\n            let op = operations.find(o => o.id === opId);\r\n            if (!op) return;\r\n            currentActiveOp = op;\r\n            sessionStorage.setItem('active_op_id', opId);\r\n\r\n            document.getElementById('operationalHub').style.display = 'none';\r\n            document.querySelector('.top-nav').style.display = 'flex';\r\n            document.getElementById('appWrapper').style.display = 'flex';\r\n\r\n            setTimeout(() => {\r\n                map.invalidateSize();\r\n                let op = operations.find(o => o.id === opId);\r\n                if (op && op.zoneData) {\r\n                    if (activeMacroZoneLayer) map.removeLayer(activeMacroZoneLayer);\r\n\r\n                    let style = { color: '#ef4444', weight: 3, fillOpacity: 0.05, dashArray: '5, 5', interactive: false };\r\n                    if (op.zoneData.type === 'radius') {\r\n                        activeMacroZoneLayer = L.circle(op.zoneData.latlng, { ...style, radius: op.zoneData.radius }).addTo(map);\r\n                    } else {\r\n                        activeMacroZoneLayer = L.rectangle(op.zoneData.bounds, style).addTo(map);\r\n                    }\r\n                    activeMacroZoneLayer.bindTooltip(\\`Operation Zone: \\${op.name}\\`, { permanent: true, direction: \"center\", className: 'op-zone-tooltip' }).openTooltip();\r\n                    map.flyToBounds(activeMacroZoneLayer.getBounds(), { padding: [50, 50], duration: 1 });\r\n                }\r\n            }, 200);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // Download Map Logic\r\n        let dlMapInstance = null;\r\n        let dlDrawnLayer = null;\r\n        let dlIsDrawing = false;\r\n        let dlStartPoint = null;\r\n\r\n        function initDlMap() {\r\n            if (dlMapInstance) return;\r\n            dlMapInstance = L.map('dlMap', { zoomControl: false }).setView([13.0827, 80.2707], 12);\r\n            L.tileLayer('https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/rastertiles/voyager/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png').addTo(dlMapInstance);\r\n            L.control.zoom({ position: 'bottomright' }).addTo(dlMapInstance);\r\n\r\n            dlMapInstance.on('mousedown', (e) => {\r\n                if (dlIsDrawing) return;\r\n                dlMapInstance.dragging.disable();\r\n                dlIsDrawing = true;\r\n                dlStartPoint = e.latlng;\r\n                if (dlDrawnLayer) dlMapInstance.removeLayer(dlDrawnLayer);\r\n                dlDrawnLayer = L.rectangle([dlStartPoint, dlStartPoint], { color: '#10b981', weight: 2, fillOpacity: 0.1, dashArray: '5, 5' }).addTo(dlMapInstance);\r\n                dlMapInstance.on('mousemove', onDlMapMove);\r\n                dlMapInstance.on('mouseup', onDlMapUp);\r\n            });\r\n\r\n            if (window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function onDlMapMove(e) {\r\n            if (!dlIsDrawing) return;\r\n            dlDrawnLayer.setBounds([dlStartPoint, e.latlng]);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function onDlMapUp(e) {\r\n            dlIsDrawing = false;\r\n            dlMapInstance.dragging.enable();\r\n            dlMapInstance.off('mousemove', onDlMapMove);\r\n            dlMapInstance.off('mouseup', onDlMapUp);\r\n            if (dlDrawnLayer) {\r\n                let bounds = dlDrawnLayer.getBounds();\r\n                document.getElementById('dlMapCoords').value = \\`NE: \\${bounds.getNorthEast().lat.toFixed(4)}, \\${bounds.getNorthEast().lng.toFixed(4)} | SW: \\${bounds.getSouthWest().lat.toFixed(4)}, \\${bounds.getSouthWest().lng.toFixed(4)}\\`;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function openDownloadMapModal() {\r\n            document.getElementById('downloadMapModal').style.display = 'flex';\r\n            document.getElementById('dlMapCoords').value = '';\r\n            let area = document.getElementById('dlMapArea').value;\r\n\r\n            if (dlDrawnLayer && dlMapInstance) dlMapInstance.removeLayer(dlDrawnLayer);\r\n            dlDrawnLayer = null;\r\n            setTimeout(() => {\r\n                initDlMap();\r\n                dlMapInstance.invalidateSize();\r\n            }, 100);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function startMapDownload() {\r\n            if (!dlDrawnLayer) {\r\n                alert(\"Please select a region on the map first.\");\r\n                return;\r\n            }\r\n            alert(\"Download initiated for selected region. Check progress in system tray.\");\r\n            closeModal('downloadMapModal');\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 1. Navigation\r\n        function switchPage(pageId, btnEl) {\r\n            document.querySelectorAll('.page-content, .dash-layout').forEach(el => el.style.display = 'none');\r\n            document.getElementById('page-' + pageId).style.display = pageId === 'dash' ? 'flex' : 'block';\r\n\r\n            document.querySelectorAll('.nav-tab').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));\r\n            if (btnEl) btnEl.classList.add('active');\r\n\r\n            if (pageId === 'dash' && map) {\r\n                setTimeout(() => map.invalidateSize(), 100);\r\n            }\r\n            if (pageId === 'notif-mgmt') {\r\n                updateMgmtPage();\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 2. Command Tabs\r\n        function filterLiveCommands(type) {\r\n            document.getElementById('liveTableContainerCritical').style.display = type === 'critical' ? 'block' : 'none';\r\n            document.getElementById('liveTableContainerNormal').style.display = type === 'normal' ? 'block' : 'none';\r\n            document.getElementById('liveTableContainerGrouped').style.display = type === 'grouped' ? 'block' : 'none';\r\n\r\n            document.getElementById('btnFilterLiveCritical').style.opacity = type === 'critical' ? '1' : '0.5';\r\n            document.getElementById('btnFilterLiveNormal').style.opacity = type === 'normal' ? '1' : '0.5';\r\n            document.getElementById('btnFilterLiveGrouped').style.opacity = type === 'grouped' ?
