'1' : '0.5';\r\n        }\r\n        function switchCmdTab(tab, btnEl) {\r\n            document.getElementById('cmd-live').style.display = 'none';\r\n            if (document.getElementById('cmd-completed')) document.getElementById('cmd-completed').style.display = 'none';\r\n\r\n            document.getElementById('cmd-' + tab).style.display = 'block';\r\n\r\n            document.querySelectorAll('.cmd-tab').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));\r\n            if (btnEl) btnEl.classList.add('active');\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 3. Modals\r\n        async function openOpDetails(type) {\r\n            const title = type === 'SOS Calls' || type === 'SOS' ? 'SOS Emergency Missions' : 'Supplies Request';\r\n            document.getElementById('opModalTitle').innerText = title;\r\n            document.getElementById('opDetailsModal').style.display = 'flex';\r\n\r\n            // Fetch all requests to show a full breakdown\r\n            try {\r\n                const res = await fetch(\\`\\${API_BASE}/rescue-requests\\`);\r\n                const allReqs = await res.json();\r\n\r\n                let filtered = [];\r\n                if (type === 'SOS Calls' || type === 'SOS') {\r\n                    filtered = allReqs.filter(r => r.type === 'sos' || r.type === 'medical' || r.type === 'pregnancy');\r\n                } else {\r\n                    filtered = allReqs.filter(r => r.type === 'food' || r.type === 'delivery' || r.type === 'medical_delivery');\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                const tbody = document.querySelector('#opDetailsModal tbody');\r\n                tbody.innerHTML = '';\r\n\r\n                if (filtered.length === 0) {\r\n                    tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan=\"5\" style=\"text-align:center; padding:20px; color:var(--text-muted);\">No records found for this category.</td></tr>';\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                filtered.forEach((r, idx) => {\r\n                    const statusTag = r.status === 'completed' ? 'tag-green' : (r.status === 'accepted' || r.status === 'assigned') ? 'tag-yellow' : 'tag-gray';\r\n                    const time = formatLocalTime(r.created_at);\r\n                    const updateTime = r.updated_at ? formatLocalTime(r.updated_at) : '--:--';\r\n\r\n                    let itemsHtml = '';\r\n                    if (r.details) {\r\n                        try {\r\n                            const d = typeof r.details === 'string' ? JSON.parse(r.details) : r.details;\r\n                            const items = [];\r\n                            if (d.food) items.push(\\`≡ƒì₧ Food: <b>\\${d.food}</b>\\`);\r\n                            if (d.med) items.push(\\`≡ƒÆè Medicine: <b>\\${d.med}</b>\\`);\r\n                            if (d.sanitary) items.push(\\`≡ƒº╗ Sanitary: <b>\\${d.sanitary}</b>\\`);\r\n                            if (d.persons) items.push(\\`≡ƒæÑ Persons: <b>\\${d.persons}</b>\\`);\r\n\r\n                            if (items.length > 0) {\r\n                                itemsHtml = \\`<div style=\"margin-top:6px; padding:6px; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.03); border-radius:4px; font-size:11px; line-height: 1.5;\">\r\n                                    \\${items.join('<br>')}\r\n                                </div>\\`;\r\n                            }\r\n                        } catch (e) { }\r\n                    }\r\n\r\n                    tbody.innerHTML += \\`\r\n                        <tr style=\"border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);\">\r\n                            <td style=\"padding: 8px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-muted);\">\\${String(idx + 1).padStart(2, '0')}</td>\r\n                            <td style=\"padding: 8px; font-weight:600;\">\r\n                                \\${r.type.toUpperCase()} @ \\${r.sector}\r\n                                \\${itemsHtml}\r\n                            </td>\r\n                            <td style=\"padding: 8px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted);\">\\${time}</td>\r\n                            <td style=\"padding: 8px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted);\">\\${updateTime}</td>\r\n                            <td style=\"padding: 8px; text-align: right;\"><span class=\"tag \\${statusTag}\">\\${r.status.toUpperCase()}</span></td>\r\n                        </tr>\r\n                    \\`;\r\n                });\r\n\r\n                // Update summary stats in modal\r\n                const accepted = filtered.filter(f => f.status === 'accepted' || f.status === 'assigned').length;\r\n                const completed = filtered.filter(f => f.status === 'completed').length;\r\n                const pending = filtered.filter(f => f.status === 'pending').length;\r\n\r\n                // Simple distribution logic for the UI cards in modal\r\n                document.querySelector('#opDetailsModal .grid-2').innerHTML = \\`\r\n                    <div>\r\n                        <div class=\"input-label\">Current Status</div>\r\n                        <div class=\"card\" style=\"padding:12px; font-weight:600; font-size:13px; display:flex; gap:10px;\">\r\n                            <span style=\"color:var(--pending)\">\\${pending} Pending</span>\r\n                            <span style=\"color:var(--accent)\">\\${accepted} Ongoing</span>\r\n                            <span style=\"color:var(--secondary)\">\\${completed} Done</span>\r\n                        </div>\r\n                    </div>\r\n                    <div>\r\n                        <div class=\"input-label\">Zone Load</div>\r\n                        <div class=\"card\" style=\"padding:12px; font-weight:600; font-size:13px;\">\r\n                            \\${filtered.length > 0 ? 'Active in ' + [...new Set(filtered.map(f => f.sector))].join(', ') : 'No Active Zones'}\r\n                        </div>\r\n                    </div>\r\n                \\`;\r\n\r\n            } catch (e) {\r\n                console.error(\"Error loading op details\", e);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        function openGroupModal() {\r\n            document.getElementById('createGroupModal').style.display = 'flex';\r\n        }\r\n        function openModal(id) {\r\n            document.getElementById(id).style.display = 'flex';\r\n        }\r\n        function closeModal(id) {\r\n            document.getElementById(id).style.display = 'none';\r\n            if (id === 'sosAlertModal' && window.currentSosAudio) {\r\n                window.currentSosAudio.pause();\r\n                window.currentSosAudio.currentTime = 0;\r\n            }\r\n            if (id === 'groupingModal') {\r\n                try {\r\n                    sessionStorage.removeItem('rescue_groupingModalOpen');\r\n                    sessionStorage.removeItem('rescue_groupingModalType');\r\n                } catch(e) {}\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 4. Map & Interactions\r\n        let map;\r\n        let drawnLayer;\r\n        let drawMode = null; // null until user selects radius or area\r\n        let zoneOverlay;\r\n        let historyStatusFilter = 'ongoing';\r\n\r\n        function setHistoryFilter(status) {\r\n            historyStatusFilter = status;\r\n            document.getElementById('btnHistOngoing').className = status === 'ongoing' ? 'btn btn-primary' : 'btn btn-outline';\r\n            document.getElementById('btnHistCompleted').className = status === 'completed' ? 'btn btn-primary' : 'btn btn-outline';\r\n            if (document.getElementById('btnHistAll')) document.getElementById('btnHistAll').className = status === 'all' ? 'btn btn-primary' : 'btn btn-outline';\r\n            renderCmds();\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function initMap() {\r\n            map = L.map('map', {\r\n                zoomControl: true,\r\n                dragging: true,\r\n                touchZoom: true,\r\n                scrollWheelZoom: true,\r\n                doubleClickZoom: true,\r\n                maxZoom: 20\r\n            }).setView([13.0827, 80.2707], 13);\r\n\r\n            // Track user interaction to pause auto-follow\r\n            map.on('movestart', () => { window.userInteractedWithMap = true; });\r\n            document.getElementById('map').addEventListener('dblclick', () => { window.userInteractedWithMap = false; });\r\n            L.tileLayer('https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/rastertiles/voyager/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png', {\r\n                errorTileUrl: 'data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=',\r\n                maxZoom: 19\r\n            }).addTo(map);\r\n            L.control.zoom({ position: 'bottomright' }).addTo(map);\r\n\r\n            // Add dynamic tactical markers\r\n            let mapMarkersData = [];\r\n\r\n            mapMarkersData.forEach(m => {\r\n                let isHex = m.type === 'rescue';\r\n                addMarker(m.lat, m.lng, m.type, \\`<i data-lucide=\"\\${m.icon}\" style=\"width:16px;height:16px;\\${isHex ? 'fill:white' : ''}\"></i>\\`, m.details, null, false, false, m.id, false, m.status);\r\n            });\r\n\r\n            // Map interaction for drawing\r\n            map.on('mousedown', onMapClick);\r\n\r\n            updateTacticalMap(true);\r\n            // Polling removed - Map updates natively via WebSockets\r\n\r\n            setTimeout(() => { if (window.lucide) lucide.createIcons(); }, 100);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        window.populateCommandForm = function (dbId, type, lat, lng, details) {\r\n            const typeInput = document.getElementById('cmdType');\r\n            if (typeInput) {\r\n                const normType = type.toLowerCase();\r\n                if (normType.includes('medical')) typeInput.value = 'medical';\r\n                else if (normType.includes('pregnancy')) typeInput.value = 'pregnancy';\r\n                else if (normType.includes('food') || normType.includes('delivery')) typeInput.value = 'food';\r\n                else if (normType.includes('sos')) typeInput.value = 'sos';\r\n                else typeInput.value = 'rescue';\r\n\r\n                typeInput.dispatchEvent(new Event('change'));\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            const areaInput = document.getElementById('cmdAreaName');\r\n            if (areaInput) {\r\n                const areaMatch = details && details.match(/Area:\\\\s*(.*)/);\r\n                areaInput.value = areaMatch ? areaMatch[1].replace(/<[^>]*>?/gm, '') : \\`Location near \\${parseFloat(lat).toFixed(4)}, \\${parseFloat(lng).toFixed(4)}\\`;\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            const coordInput = document.getElementById('cmdCoords');\r\n            if (coordInput) {\r\n                coordInput.value = \\`\\${parseFloat(lat).toFixed(6)}, \\${parseFloat(lng).toFixed(6)}\\`;\r\n                coordInput.dataset.reqId = dbId;\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            const detailsInput = document.getElementById('cmdDetails');\r\n            if (detailsInput) {\r\n                const textDetails = details ? details.replace(/<br\\\\s*[\\\\/]?>/gi, '\\\\n').replace(/<[^>]*>?/gm, '') : '';\r\n                detailsInput.value = \\`[Auto-Assigned \\${type.toUpperCase()} Request #\\${dbId}]\\\\n\\${textDetails}\\`;\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            document.querySelector('.sidebar.left').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });\r\n\r\n            if (typeof showAdminToast === 'function') {\r\n                showAdminToast(\\`Selected \\${type.toUpperCase()} Request #\\${dbId} for Assignment\\`);\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            const formPanel = document.querySelector('.sidebar.left');\r\n            if (formPanel) {\r\n                formPanel.style.transition = 'box-shadow 0.3s';\r\n                formPanel.style.boxShadow = '0 0 0 3px var(--primary)';\r\n                setTimeout(() => formPanel.style.boxShadow = '', 800);\r\n            }\r\n        };\r\n\r\n        function addMarker(lat, lng, type, iconHtml, details, label, isCriticalMovement = false, isGrouped = false, dbId = null, isCommand = false, status = null, timestamp = null, userId = null, currentMission = null) {\r\n            // Priority check for pulsing\r\n            const isPriority = isCriticalMovement || ['sos', 'medical', 'pregnancy', 'command', 'critical'].includes(type.toLowerCase());\r\n            const markerClass = \\`marker-\\${type.toLowerCase()} \\${isGrouped ? 'marker-grouped' : ''}\\`;\r\n\r\n            const icon = L.divIcon({\r\n                className: \\`custom-marker \\${markerClass}\\`,\r\n                html: \\`\r\n                    <div style=\"position:relative; width:34px; height:34px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;\">\r\n                        \\${isPriority ? \\`<div class=\"marker-pulse\" style=\"background:\\${['command', 'sos', 'critical'].includes(type.toLowerCase()) ? '#ef4444' : '#3b82f6'}\"></div>\\` : ''}\r\n                        <div class=\"marker-inner\" style=\"\\${isGrouped ? 'border-style: dashed !important;' : ''}\">\r\n                            \\${iconHtml}\r\n                        </div>\r\n                        \\${label ? \\`<div class=\"marker-label\">\\${label}</div>\\` : ''}\r\n                    </div>\r\n                \\`,\r\n                iconSize: [34, 34],\r\n                iconAnchor: [17, 17]\r\n            });\r\n\r\n            // Make command markers draggable (SOS tasks should stick to coordinates)\r\n            const draggable = isCommand && dbId !== null;\r\n\r\n            let marker = L.marker([lat, lng], {\r\n                icon: icon,\r\n                draggable: draggable\r\n            });\r\n            // Marker gets added to map or cluster group externally\r\n\r\n\r\n            marker.on('click', () => {\r\n                const coordInput = document.getElementById('cmdCoords');\r\n                if (coordInput) {\r\n                    coordInput.value = \\`\\${parseFloat(lat).toFixed(6)}, \\${parseFloat(lng).toFixed(6)}\\`;\r\n                    if (dbId) coordInput.dataset.reqId = dbId;\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n\r\n            if (draggable) {\r\n                marker.on('dragend', async function (e) {\r\n                    const newPos = e.target.getLatLng();\r\n                    const endpoint = isCommand ? \\`\\${API_BASE}/commands/\\${dbId}/location\\` : \\`\\${API_BASE}/rescue-requests/\\${dbId}/location\\`;\r\n\r\n                    try {\r\n                        const res = await fetch(endpoint, {\r\n                            method: 'PUT',\r\n                            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\r\n                            body: JSON.stringify({ lat: newPos.lat, lng: newPos.lng })\r\n                        });\r\n\r\n                        if (res.ok) {\r\n                            showAdminToast(\\`\\${isCommand ? 'Command' : 'Rescue'} location updated successfully\\`);\r\n                            // Refresh map to sync all layers (like dotted lines)\r\n                            updateTacticalMap();\r\n                        } else {\r\n                            // Revert if failed\r\n                            marker.setLatLng([lat, lng]);\r\n                            alert(\"Failed to update location\");\r\n                        }\r\n                    } catch (err) {\r\n                        marker.setLatLng([lat, lng]);\r\n                        console.error(\"Drag update failed\", err);\r\n                    }\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n            if (details) {\r\n                let statusHtml = '';\r\n                let actionHtml = '';\r\n                let metaHtml = '';\r\n\r\n                if (userId || label) {\r\n                    metaHtml += \\`<div style=\"font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text-muted); margin-bottom:2px;\">User ID: \\${userId || label}</div>\\`;\r\n                }\r\n                if (currentMission) {\r\n                    metaHtml += \\`<div style=\"font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:#3b82f6; margin-bottom:2px;\">Current Mission: \\${currentMission}</div>\\`;\r\n                }\r\n                if (timestamp) {\r\n                    metaHtml += \\`<div style=\"font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text-muted); margin-bottom:2px;\">Created: \\${formatLocalDate(timestamp)}</div>\\`;\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                if (dbId) {\r\n                    if (status) {\r\n                        let badgeClass = status === 'pending' ? 'tag-yellow' : (status === 'completed' ? 'tag-green' : (status === 'declined' ? 'tag-red' : 'tag-purple'));\r\n                        statusHtml = \\`<div style=\"margin-top:8px; margin-bottom:4px;\"><span class=\"tag \\${badgeClass}\">\\${status.toUpperCase()}</span></div>\\`;\r\n                    }\r\n\r\n                    if (status !== 'completed' && status !== 'declined') {\r\n                        const safeDetails = details.replace(/'/g, \"\\\\\\\\'\").replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\");\r\n\r\n                        if (isCommand) {\r\n                            // For commands, show Re-assign and Close\r\n                            actionHtml = \\`\r\n                                <div style=\"margin-top:10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px;\">\r\n                                    <button class=\"btn btn-primary\" style=\"width:100%; font-size:11px; padding:6px; cursor: pointer;\" \r\n                                        onclick=\"window.openReassignModal('\\${dbId}')\">\r\n                                        <i data-lucide=\"refresh-cw\" style=\"width:12px; margin-right:4px;\"></i> Re-assign Task\r\n                                    </button>\r\n                                    <button class=\"btn btn-danger\" style=\"width:100%; font-size:11px; padding:6px; cursor: pointer; background: #ef4444; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px;\" \r\n                                        onclick=\"window.closeTaskByAdmin('\\${dbId}')\">\r\n                                        <i data-lucide=\"check-circle\" style=\"width:12px; margin-right:4px;\"></i> Close Task\r\n                                    </button>\r\n                                </div>\\`;\r\n                        } else {\r\n                            // For rescue requests, show Assign (if pending) and Close\r\n                            actionHtml = \\`\r\n                                <div style=\"margin-top:10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px;\">\r\n                                    \\${status === 'pending' ? \\`\r\n                                    <button class=\"btn btn-primary\" style=\"width:100%; font-size:11px; padding:6px; cursor: pointer;\" \r\n                                        onclick=\"window.populateCommandForm(\\${dbId}, '\\${type}', \\${lat}, \\${lng}, '\\${safeDetails}')\">\r\n                                        <i data-lucide=\"plus-circle\" style=\"width:12px; margin-right:4px;\"></i> Assign Task\r\n                                    </button>\\` : ''}\r\n                                    <button class=\"btn btn-danger\" style=\"width:100%; font-size:11px; padding:6px; cursor: pointer; background: #ef4444; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px;\" \r\n                                        onclick=\"window.closeRescueRequest(\\${dbId})\">\r\n                                        <i data-lucide=\"check-circle\" style=\"width:12px; margin-right:4px;\"></i> Close Request\r\n                                    </button>\r\n                                </div>\\`;\r\n                        }\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                marker.bindPopup(\\`<div style=\"font-family:'Inter'; font-size:13px; padding:4px; min-width:180px;\">\r\n                    <div style=\"font-weight:900; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:4px; color:var(--primary);\">\\${type} Mission</div>\r\n                    \\${metaHtml}\r\n                    <div style=\"line-height:1.4; color:var(--text-muted); margin-top:4px;\">\\${details}</div>\r\n                    \\${statusHtml}\r\n                    \\${actionHtml}\r\n                </div>\\`);\r\n\r\n                marker.on('popupopen', () => {\r\n                    if (window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            return marker;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        let mapLayers = [];\r\n        async function updateTacticalMap(forceFetch = false) {\r\n            if (!map) return;\r\n            try {\r\n                let zones, rescuers, tasks, activeCmds, groups;\r\n\r\n                if (forceFetch || globalZones.length === 0 || globalRescuers.length === 0) {\r\n                    const [zonesRes, rescuersRes, tasksRes, cmdsRes, groupsRes] = await Promise.all([\r\n                        fetch(\\`\\${API_BASE}/zones\\`),\r\n                        fetch(\\`\\${API_BASE}/users?role=rescuer\\`),\r\n                        fetch(\\`\\${API_BASE}/rescue-requests?status=active\\`),\r\n                        fetch(\\`\\${API_BASE}/commands\\`),\r\n                        fetch(\\`\\${API_BASE}/groups\\`)\r\n                    ]);\r\n\r\n                    zones = await zonesRes.json();\r\n                    rescuers = await rescuersRes.json();\r\n                    tasks = await tasksRes.json();\r\n                    activeCmds = await cmdsRes.json();\r\n                    groups = await groupsRes.json();\r\n\r\n                    globalZones = zones;\r\n                    globalRescuers = rescuers;\r\n                    rawCmds = activeCmds;\r\n                } else {\r\n                    zones = globalZones;\r\n                    rescuers = globalRescuers;\r\n                    tasks = rescueRequests.filter(r => r.status !== 'completed' && r.status !== 'declined');\r\n                    activeCmds = rawCmds;\r\n                    groups = currentGroups;\r\n                }\r\n                // ENGINEERING FIX: Do not overwrite groupedTasks global state with static crew squads.\r\n\r\n                // Auto-Erase Tracked Route if completed/closed/removed\r\n                if (window.selectedTrackingCmdId) {\r\n                    const trackingIdNum = typeof window.selectedTrackingCmdId === 'string' \r\n                        ? window.selectedTrackingCmdId.replace('CMD-', '') \r\n                        : window.selectedTrackingCmdId;\r\n                    \r\n                    const activeCmd = activeCmds.find(c => c.id.toString() === trackingIdNum.toString());\r\n                    if (!activeCmd || activeCmd.status === 'completed' || activeCmd.status === 'declined' || activeCmd.status === 'finished') {\r\n                        window.selectedTrackingCmdId = null;\r\n                        window.selectedTrackingBounds = null;\r\n                        window.userInteractedWithMap = false;\r\n                        if (selectedCmdLayer) {\r\n                            map.removeLayer(selectedCmdLayer);\r\n                            selectedCmdLayer = null;\r\n                        }\r\n                        const detailsPanel = document.getElementById('commandDetailsPanel');\r\n                        const formPanel = document.getElementById('commandFormPanel');\r\n                        if (detailsPanel) detailsPanel.style.display = 'none';\r\n                        if (formPanel) formPanel.style.display = 'block';\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                // Reset tracking bounds to allow dynamic zoom-in as rescuer approaches\r\n                if (window.selectedTrackingCmdId) {\r\n                    window.selectedTrackingBounds = L.latLngBounds();\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                // Clear existing tactical layers\r\n                mapLayers.forEach(l => map.removeLayer(l));\r\n                mapLayers = [];\r\n\r\n                for (let id in groupPerimeters) {\r\n                    if (groupPerimeters[id]) {\r\n                        map.removeLayer(groupPerimeters[id]);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n                groupPerimeters = {};\r\n\r\n                if (window.markerClusterGroup) {\r\n                    map.removeLayer(window.markerClusterGroup);\r\n                }\r\n                window.markerClusterGroup = L.markerClusterGroup({\r\n                    maxClusterRadius: 40,\r\n                    spiderfyOnMaxZoom: true,\r\n                    showCoverageOnHover: false,\r\n                    zoomToBoundsOnClick: true\r\n                });\r\n\r\n                // 1. Render Zones (Minimal Transparent Grouped Visualization)\r\n                zones.forEach(z => {\r\n                    if (z.status === 'inactive') return;\r\n                    try {\r\n                        const isGrouped = z.zone_name.includes('Grouped Task Zone') || z.zone_name.includes('Command Zone');\r\n                        \r\n                        // Fix for ghost zones: Do not render permanent Grouped Task Zones since group perimeters are dynamically drawn\r\n                        if (z.zone_name === 'Grouped Task Zone') return;\r\n                        \r\n                        // Fix for ghost command zones: Only render if there's an active command matching this zone name\r\n                        if (z.zone_name.startsWith('Command Zone: ')) {\r\n                            const areaName = z.zone_name.replace('Command Zone: ', '');\r\n                            const hasActiveCmd = activeCmds.some(c => {\r\n                                if (!c.status) return false;\r\n                                const s = c.status.toLowerCase();\r\n                                if (s === 'completed' || s === 'declined' || s === 'finished' || s === 'closed') return false;\r\n                                try {\r\n                                    const payload = typeof c.command_payload === 'string' ? JSON.parse(c.command_payload) : c.command_payload;\r\n                                    return payload && payload.zone === areaName;\r\n                                } catch (e) { return false; }\r\n                            });\r\n                            if (!hasActiveCmd) return;\r\n                        }\r\n\r\n                        const geo = JSON.parse(z.zone_geometry);\r\n                        let layer;\r\n\r\n                        const latlng = geo.latlng || geo.center;\r\n                        const radius = geo.radius;\r\n\r\n                        if (geo.type === 'Circle' || geo.type === 'radius' || (latlng && radius)) {\r\n                            layer = L.circle([latlng.lat, latlng.lng], {\r\n                                radius: radius,\r\n                                color: isGrouped ? '#3b82f6' : (z.color || '#ef4444'),\r\n                                dashArray: isGrouped ? '5, 5' : '0',\r\n                                fillOpacity: isGrouped ? 0.08 : 0.05,\r\n                                weight: isGrouped ? 2 : 1.5\r\n                            }).addTo(map);\r\n                        } else if (geo.bounds) {\r\n                            layer = L.rectangle(geo.bounds, {\r\n                                color: isGrouped ? '#3b82f6' : (z.color || '#ef4444'),\r\n                                dashArray: isGrouped ? '5, 5' : '0',\r\n                                fillOpacity: isGrouped ? 0.08 : 0.05,\r\n                                weight: isGrouped ? 2 : 1.5\r\n                            }).addTo(map);\r\n                        }\r\n\r\n                        if (layer) {\r\n                            layer.bindTooltip(z.zone_name.toLowerCase(), {\r\n                                permanent: true,\r\n                                direction: 'center',\r\n                                className: 'zone-tooltip',\r\n                                opacity: 0.8\r\n                            });\r\n                            mapLayers.push(layer);\r\n                        }\r\n                    } catch (e) { }\r\n                });\r\n\r\n                // 2. Render Rescuers & Missions (with Dotted Lines for Critical Tasks)\r\n                rescuers.forEach(r => {\r\n                    if (r.lat && r.lng) {\r\n                        // Find current mission if any\r\n                        const assignedTask = tasks.find(t => t.status === 'assigned' && t.rescuer_phone === r.phone);\r\n                        const assignedCmd = activeCmds.find(c => c.status === 'accepted' && c.target_phone === r.phone);\r\n                        const missionInfo = assignedTask ? assignedTask.type.toUpperCase() : (assignedCmd ? 'HQ DIRECTIVE' : 'AVAILABLE');\r\n\r\n                        const rescuerIconHtml = \\`<div style=\"background:url('official_rescuer_icon.png'); background-size:cover; width:100%; height:100%; border-radius:50%;\"></div>\\`;\r\n                        let statusText = 'online';\r\n                        let isOffline = false;\r\n                        if (r.status === 'offline' || r.live_connected === false) {\r\n                            statusText = 'ΓÜá∩╕Å Signal Lost / Offline';\r\n                            isOffline = true;\r\n                        }\r\n                        const m = addMarker(r.lat, r.lng, 'rescuer', rescuerIconHtml, \\`Rescuer: \\${r.name}\\`, r.name, false, false, r.id, false, statusText, null, r.serial_number || r.phone, missionInfo);\r\n\r\n                        if (isOffline) {\r\n                            m.setOpacity(0.6); // Gray out slightly if offline\r\n                        }\r\n\r\n                        window.markerClusterGroup.addLayer(m);\r\n                        mapLayers.push(m);\r\n\r\n                        // Helper to check if rescuer is in a specific group\r\n                        const isInGroup = (groupId) => r.groups && r.groups.some(g => g.id === groupId);\r\n\r\n                        // Draw lines for assigned commands (Critical always shown, others when selected)\r\n                        activeCmds.forEach(c => {\r\n                            const isCriticalCmd = c.command_type === 'critical' || c.priority === 'critical' || c.command_type === 'sos';\r\n                            const isSelected = (window.selectedTrackingCmdId == c.id) ||\r\n                                               (window.selectedTrackingCmdId === \\`CMD-\\${c.id}\\`) ||\r\n                                               (typeof window.selectedTrackingCmdId === 'string' && window.selectedTrackingCmdId.replace('CMD-', '') == c.id);\r\n\r\n                            if ((isCriticalCmd || isSelected) && (c.status !== 'completed' || isSelected) && (c.target_phone == r.phone || c.target_phone == r.device_id || (r.id && c.target_phone == r.id) || isInGroup(c.group_id))) {\r\n                                // Find all target request locations\r\n                                let targetLocations = [];\r\n                                const payload = JSON.parse(c.command_payload || '{}');\r\n\r\n                                if (c.command_type === 'group' && payload.request_ids) {\r\n                                    payload.request_ids.forEach(reqId => {\r\n                                        const tReq = tasks.find(t => t.id.toString() === reqId.toString());\r\n                                        if (tReq && tReq.lat && tReq.lng) targetLocations.push([tReq.lat, tReq.lng]);\r\n                                    });\r\n                                } else if (c.requester_lat && c.requester_lng) {\r\n                                    targetLocations.push([c.requester_lat, c.requester_lng]);\r\n                                } else {\r\n                                    let foundTarget = false;\r\n                                    if (payload.rescue_req_id) {\r\n                                        const targetReq = tasks.find(t => t.id.toString() === payload.rescue_req_id.toString());\r\n                                        if (targetReq && targetReq.lat && targetReq.lng) {\r\n                                            targetLocations.push([targetReq.lat, targetReq.lng]);\r\n                                            foundTarget = true;\r\n                                        }\r\n                                    }\r\n                                    if (!foundTarget && payload.lat && payload.lng) {\r\n                                        targetLocations.push([payload.lat, payload.lng]);\r\n                                    }\r\n                                }\r\n\r\n                                targetLocations.forEach(loc => {\r\n                                    let isOffline = (r.status === 'offline' || r.live_connected === false);\r\n\r\n                                    const lineOptions = isSelected ? {\r\n                                        color: isOffline ? '#9ca3af' : '#2563eb',\r\n                                        weight: 6,\r\n                                        dashArray: isOffline ? '10, 10' : null,\r\n                                        opacity: 1,\r\n                                        className: 'tracking-pulse-line'\r\n                                    } : {\r\n                                        color: '#ef4444',\r\n                                        weight: 2,\r\n                                        dashArray: '5, 10',\r\n                                        opacity: 0.6\r\n                                    };\r\n\r\n                                    const line = L.polyline([[r.lat, r.lng], loc], lineOptions).addTo(map);\r\n                                    mapLayers.push(line);\r\n\r\n                                    if (isSelected && window.selectedTrackingBounds) {\r\n                                        window.selectedTrackingBounds.extend([r.lat, r.lng]);\r\n                                        window.selectedTrackingBounds.extend(loc);\r\n\r\n                                        // Real-time follow: Keep both in view as they move\r\n                                        if (!window.userInteractedWithMap) {\r\n                                            map.fitBounds(window.selectedTrackingBounds, { padding: [80, 80], animate: true });\r\n                                        }\r\n                                    }\r\n                                });\r\n                            }\r\n                        });\r\n\r\n                        // Draw lines for assigned rescue tasks (Public SOS)\r\n                        tasks.forEach(t => {\r\n                            if (t.lat && t.lng && t.status !== 'completed' && (t.assigned_user_id === r.id || isInGroup(t.assigned_group_id))) {\r\n                                const line = L.polyline([[r.lat, r.lng], [t.lat, t.lng]], {\r\n                                    color: '#f59e0b', // High visibility warning color\r\n                                    weight: 3,\r\n                                    dashArray: '5, 10',\r\n                                    opacity: 0.8\r\n                                }).addTo(map);\r\n                                mapLayers.push(line);\r\n                            }\r\n                        });\r\n                    }\r\n                });\r\n\r\n                // 2.5 Render Group Perimeters for all active (non-Closed) groups\r\n                groupedTasks.filter(g => {\r\n                    if (!g.status) return true;\r\n                    const s = g.status.toLowerCase();\r\n                    return s !== 'closed' && s !== 'completed' && s !== 'finished';\r\n                }).forEach(g => {\r\n                    const coords = g.requests ? g.requests.map(req => [parseFloat(req.lat), parseFloat(req.lng)]).filter(c => !isNaN(c[0])) : [];\r\n                    if (coords.length === 0) return;\r\n\r\n                    let isCompleted = false; // We already filtered them out, but keep logic safely\r\n                    let style = {\r\n                        color: isCompleted ? '#22c55e' : '#a855f7',\r\n                        fillColor: isCompleted ? '#22c55e' : '#a855f7',\r\n                        fillOpacity: 0.1,\r\n                        dashArray: '5, 8',\r\n                        weight: 2.5\r\n                    };\r\n\r\n                    const hull = g.custom_polygon || generateTacticalPolygon(coords);\r\n                    const poly = L.polygon(hull, style).addTo(map);\r\n                    groupPerimeters[g.id] = poly;\r\n                    mapLayers.push(poly);\r\n\r\n                    let assignedTo = g.assigned_to || 'Assigned';\r\n                    poly.bindPopup(\\`\r\n                        <div style=\"font-family:'Inter'; padding:5px; text-align:center;\">\r\n                            <b style=\"color:var(--special); font-size:14px;\">\\${g.name}</b><br>\r\n                            <span style=\"font-size:11px; color:var(--text-muted);\">\\${g.requests.length} Requests Clustered</span><br>\r\n                            <span style=\"font-size:11px; color:var(--text-main); font-weight:600;\">Status: \\${g.status}</span><br>\r\n                            <span style=\"font-size:11px; color:var(--primary); font-weight:600;\">Team: \\${assignedTo}</span><br>\r\n                        </div>\r\n                    \\`);\r\n                });\r\n\r\n                // 3. Render Active Tasks (with Grouped styling)\r\n                tasks.filter(t => {\r\n                    if (!t.lat || !t.lng || !t.status) return false;\r\n                    const s = t.status.toLowerCase();\r\n                    return s !== 'completed' && s !== 'declined' && s !== 'finished' && s !== 'closed';\r\n                }).forEach(t => {\r\n                    const activeZones = zones.filter(z => z.status === 'active');\r\n                    const isInZone = activeZones.some(z => {\r\n                        try {\r\n                            const geo = JSON.parse(z.zone_geometry);\r\n                            const latlng = geo.latlng || geo.center;\r\n                            if (latlng && (geo.type === 'Circle' || geo.type === 'radius' || geo.radius)) {\r\n                                const dist = map.distance([t.lat, t.lng], [latlng.lat, latlng.lng]);\r\n                                return dist <= geo.radius;\r\n                            } else if (geo.bounds) {\r\n                                return L.latLngBounds(geo.bounds).contains([t.lat, t.lng]);\r\n                            }\r\n                        } catch (e) { return false; }\r\n                        return false;\r\n                    });\r\n\r\n                    // Skip tasks that have become commands\r\n                    if (['assigned', 'accepted', 'ongoing'].includes(t.status)) {\r\n                        const hasCmd = activeCmds.some(c => {\r\n                            try {\r\n                                const p = typeof c.command_payload === 'string' ? JSON.parse(c.command_payload) : c.command_payload;\r\n                                if (p && p.rescue_req_id && String(p.rescue_req_id) === String(t.id)) return true;\r\n                                if (p && p.request_ids && Array.isArray(p.request_ids) && p.request_ids.map(String).includes(String(t.id))) return true;\r\n                            } catch (e) { return false; }\r\n                            return false;\r\n                        });\r\n                        if (hasCmd) return; // Let the command marker render instead\r\n                    }\r\n\r\n                    const typeStr = t.type ? t.type.toLowerCase() : 'emergency';\r\n                    const icon = getTaskIconByType(typeStr);\r\n                    const label = t.serial_number || t.phone || t.device_id;\r\n                    let detailsHtml = \\`Request: \\${typeStr}<br>Area: \\${t.sector}\\`;\r\n                    if (t.image_url) {\r\n                        detailsHtml += \\`<br><div style=\"margin-top:8px; border-radius:6px; overflow:hidden; border:1px solid var(--border);\"><img src=\"\\${formatMediaUrl(t.image_url)}\" style=\"width:100%; max-height:140px; object-fit:cover; cursor:pointer;\" onclick=\"event.stopPropagation(); window.open(this.src, '_blank')\"></div>\\`;\r\n                    }\r\n                    const m = addMarker(t.lat, t.lng, typeStr, icon, detailsHtml, label, false, isInZone, t.id, false, t.status, t.created_at, label);\r\n                    window.markerClusterGroup.addLayer(m);\r\n                    mapLayers.push(m);\r\n                });\r\n\r\n                // 4. Render Active Commands (Crosshair markers)\r\n                activeCmds.forEach(c => {\r\n                    if (c.status === 'completed' || c.status === 'declined' || c.status === 'finished') return;\r\n\r\n                    let cLat, cLng;\r\n                    // Check if command has explicit coordinates in payload\r\n                    try {\r\n                        const p = typeof c.command_payload === 'string' ? JSON.parse(c.command_payload) : c.command_payload;\r\n                        if (p && p.lat && p.lng) {\r\n                            cLat = p.lat;\r\n                            cLng = p.lng;\r\n                        } else if (c.layerData && c.layerData.latlng) {\r\n                            cLat = c.layerData.latlng.lat;\r\n                            cLng = c.layerData.latlng.lng;\r\n                        }\r\n                    } catch (e) { }\r\n\r\n                    if (cLat && cLng) {\r\n                        const icon = \\`<i data-lucide=\"crosshair\" style=\"width:16px; color:#ef4444;\"></i>\\`;\r\n                        const dbId = c.id;\r\n                        const m = addMarker(cLat, cLng, 'command', icon, \\`Command: \\${c.desc || 'Direct Order'}<br>Status: \\${c.status}\\`, \\`CMD-\\${c.id}\\`, false, false, dbId, true, c.status, c.timestamp, c.target_phone || c.id);\r\n                        window.markerClusterGroup.addLayer(m);\r\n                        mapLayers.push(m);\r\n                    }\r\n                });\r\n\r\n                // Finally add the cluster group to map\r\n                map.addLayer(window.markerClusterGroup);\r\n\r\n                if (window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();\r\n            } catch (e) { console.error('Map update error', e); }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function getTaskIconByType(type) {\r\n            type = type.toLowerCase();\r\n            if (type.includes('food')) return '<i data-lucide=\"package\" style=\"width:16px;height:16px;stroke-width:3;\"></i>';\r\n            if (type.includes('medical')) return '<i data-lucide=\"activity\" style=\"width:16px;height:16px;stroke-width:3;\"></i>';\r\n            if (type.includes('pregnancy')) return '<i data-lucide=\"baby\" style=\"width:16px;height:16px;stroke-width:3;\"></i>';\r\n            if (type.includes('sos') || type.includes('critical')) return '<i data-lucide=\"alert-triangle\" style=\"width:16px;height:16px;stroke-width:3;\"></i>';\r\n            return '<i data-lucide=\"map-pin\" style=\"width:16px;height:16px;stroke-width:3;\"></i>';\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function setDrawMode(mode) {\r\n            drawMode = mode;\r\n            document.getElementById('btnRad').classList.remove('active');\r\n            document.getElementById('btnArea').classList.remove('active');\r\n            document.getElementById(mode === 'radius' ? 'btnRad' : 'btnArea').classList.add('active');\r\n            map.getContainer().style.cursor = 'crosshair';\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        let isDrawing = false;\r\n        let startPoint = null;\r\n\r\n        function onMapClick(e) {\r\n            if (!drawMode) return; // Prevent unaware clicks if no tool is selected\r\n            if (isDrawing) return;\r\n            map.dragging.disable();\r\n            isDrawing = true;\r\n            startPoint = e.latlng;\r\n            if (drawnLayer) map.removeLayer(drawnLayer);\r\n\r\n            let style = { color: '#3b82f6', weight: 2, fillOpacity: 0.1, dashArray: '5, 5' };\r\n            if (drawMode === 'radius') {\r\n                drawnLayer = L.circle(startPoint, { ...style, radius: 0 }).addTo(map);\r\n            } else {\r\n                drawnLayer = L.rectangle([startPoint, startPoint], style).addTo(map);\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            drawnLayer.bindTooltip(\"Task Zone\", { permanent: true, direction: \"center\", className: 'zone-tooltip' }).openTooltip();\r\n\r\n            map.on('mousemove', onMapMove);\r\n            map.on('mouseup', onMapUp);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function onMapMove(e) {\r\n            if (!isDrawing) return;\r\n            if (drawMode === 'radius') {\r\n                let r = map.distance(startPoint, e.latlng);\r\n                drawnLayer.setRadius(r);\r\n                document.getElementById('distanceInput').value = (r / 1000).toFixed(2);\r\n            } else {\r\n                drawnLayer.setBounds([startPoint, e.latlng]);\r\n                document.getElementById('distanceInput').value = (map.distance(startPoint, e.latlng) / 1000).toFixed(2);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function onMapUp(e) {\r\n            isDrawing = false;\r\n            map.dragging.enable();\r\n            map.off('mousemove', onMapMove);\r\n            map.off('mouseup', onMapUp);\r\n            map.getContainer().style.cursor = '';\r\n\r\n            // Auto-fill Command Input\r\n            if (drawnLayer) {\r\n                let bounds = drawnLayer.getBounds();\r\n                let center = bounds.getCenter();\r\n                document.getElementById('cmdCoords').value = \\`Lat: \\${center.lat.toFixed(3)}, Lng: \\${center.lng.toFixed(3)}\\`;\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            // Keep draw mode active so subsequent clicks draw a new zone\r\n            // until the user presses Escape or explicitly changes the tool.\r\n            map.getContainer().style.cursor = 'crosshair';\r\n        }\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n        document.addEventListener('keydown', function (e) {\r\n            if (e.key === 'Escape') {\r\n                // 1. Cancel main dashboard drawing\r\n                if (isDrawing) {\r\n                    map.off('mousemove', onMapMove);\r\n                    map.off('mouseup', onMapUp);\r\n                    map.dragging.enable();\r\n                }\r\n                if (drawnLayer) {\r\n                    map.removeLayer(drawnLayer);\r\n                    drawnLayer = null;\r\n                }\r\n                drawMode = null;\r\n                isDrawing = false;\r\n                if (map) map.getContainer().style.cursor = '';\r\n\r\n                // Reset button states\r\n                const btnRad = document.getElementById('btnRad');\r\n                const btnArea = document.getElementById('btnArea');\r\n                if (btnRad) btnRad.classList.remove('active');\r\n                if (btnArea) btnArea.classList.remove('active');\r\n\r\n                // Clear inputs\r\n                if (document.getElementById('cmdCoords')) document.getElementById('cmdCoords').value = '';\r\n                if (document.getElementById('distanceInput')) document.getElementById('distanceInput').value = '';\r\n\r\n                // 2. Cancel Operation Modal drawing\r\n                if (opIsDrawing) {\r\n                    opMapInstance.off('mousemove', onOpMapMove);\r\n                    opMapInstance.off('mouseup', onOpMapUp);\r\n                    opMapInstance.dragging.enable();\r\n                }\r\n                if (opDrawnLayer) {\r\n                    opMapInstance.removeLayer(opDrawnLayer);\r\n                    opDrawnLayer = null;\r\n                }\r\n                opIsDrawing = false;\r\n                if (opMapInstance) opMapInstance.getContainer().style.cursor = '';\r\n                if (document.getElementById('opZoneText')) document.getElementById('opZoneText').value = '';\r\n\r\n                // 3. Cancel Download Modal drawing\r\n                if (dlIsDrawing) {\r\n                    dlMapInstance.off('mousemove', onDlMapMove);\r\n                    dlMapInstance.off('mouseup', onDlMapUp);\r\n                    dlMapInstance.dragging.enable();\r\n                }\r\n                if (dlDrawnLayer) {\r\n                    dlMapInstance.removeLayer(dlDrawnLayer);\r\n                    dlDrawnLayer = null;\r\n                }\r\n                dlIsDrawing = false;\r\n                if (document.getElementById('dlMapCoords')) document.getElementById('dlMapCoords').value = '';\r\n\r\n                // 4. Clear Triage Selection\r\n                document.querySelectorAll('.mgmt-select-checkbox').forEach(cb => cb.checked = false);\r\n                updateMgmtSelection();\r\n                const detailPanel = document.getElementById('mgmtDetailPanel');\r\n                if (detailPanel) {\r\n                    detailPanel.innerHTML = \\`\r\n                        <div style=\"flex:1; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; color:var(--text-muted); flex-direction:column; gap:16px; padding:40px; text-align:center;\">\r\n                            <i data-lucide=\"info\" style=\"width:48px; height:48px; opacity:0.2;\"></i>\r\n                            <p style=\"font-weight:600;\">Select a mission from the triage columns to view tactical coordinates and requester profile.</p>\r\n                        </div>\r\n                    \\`;\r\n                    if (window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                // 5. Clear Grouping Caches and Close Modal\r\n                try {\r\n                    clearGroupingCaches();\r\n                    closeModal('groupingModal');\r\n                } catch(err) { console.error(\"Escape clear grouping caches error\", err); }\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        function deployTracker() {\r\n            if (drawnLayer) {\r\n                drawnLayer.setStyle({ dashArray: null, color: '#2563eb', fillOpacity: 0.08 });\r\n                alert('Zone Tracker Deployed!');\r\n            } else {\r\n                alert('Please draw a zone on the map first.');\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function toggleCurrentZone() {\r\n            if (drawnLayer) {\r\n                map.flyToBounds(drawnLayer.getBounds(), { duration: 1 });\r\n            } else if (activeMacroZoneLayer) {\r\n                map.flyToBounds(activeMacroZoneLayer.getBounds(), { padding: [50, 50], duration: 1 });\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 5. Command Logic\r\n\r\n        let selectedCmdLayer = null;\r\n        function selectTask(id) {\r\n            // Ensure we are on the dashboard to see the map and panel\r\n            switchPage('dash');\r\n\r\n            let cmd = cmds.find(c => c.id === id);\r\n            if (!cmd) {\r\n                // FALLBACK: Search in rescueRequests (for directly grouped/completed child tasks)\r\n                const cleanId = id.toString().replace('REQ-', '').replace('PUB-', '');\r\n                const req = rescueRequests.find(r => r.id.toString() === cleanId);\r\n                if (req) {\r\n                    let assignedTo = 'Unassigned';\r\n                    if (req.assigned_officer_name) {\r\n                        assignedTo = \\`≡ƒæñ \\${req.assigned_officer_name}\\`;\r\n                    } else if (req.assigned_group_name) {\r\n                        assignedTo = \\`≡ƒæÑ \\${req.assigned_group_name}\\`;\r\n                    } else if (req.assigned_user_id) {\r\n                        assignedTo = \\`Rescuer \\${req.assigned_user_id}\\`;\r\n                    } else if (req.assigned_group_id) {\r\n                        assignedTo = \\`Group \\${req.assigned_group_id}\\`;\r\n                    }\r\n\r\n                    cmd = {\r\n                        id: 'REQ-' + req.id,\r\n                        desc: \\`\\${(req.type || 'Request').toUpperCase()} Task\\`,\r\n                        type: req.type || 'emergency',\r\n                        priority: req.priority || 'normal',\r\n                        zone: req.sector || 'N/A',\r\n                        team: assignedTo,\r\n                        time: formatLocalTime(req.created_at),\r\n                        status: (req.status || 'pending').charAt(0).toUpperCase() + (req.status || 'pending').slice(1),\r\n                        rescueReqId: req.id,\r\n                        requestIds: [],\r\n                        payload: req,\r\n                        requesterName: req.assigned_officer_name || 'Citizen',\r\n                        requesterPhone: req.phone || null,\r\n                        requesterType: req.type || null,\r\n                        requesterLat: req.lat || null,\r\n                        requesterLng: req.lng || null,\r\n                        requesterUrgency: req.urgency || null,\r\n                        details: req.details || null,\r\n                        requesterImageUrl: req.image_url || null,\r\n                        requesterAudioUrl: req.audio_url || null,\r\n                        completion_image_url: req.completion_image_url || null,\r\n                        reqTime: formatLocalTime(req.created_at)\r\n                    };\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            if (!cmd) return;\r\n\r\n            // Show details panel, hide form\r\n            document.getElementById('commandFormPanel').style.display = 'none';\r\n            document.getElementById('commandDetailsPanel').style.display = 'flex';\r\n\r\n            document.getElementById('tdId').innerText = \\`\\${cmd.id} ΓÇó \\${cmd.type.toUpperCase()}\\`;\r\n            document.getElementById('tdDesc').innerText = cmd.desc;\r\n            document.getElementById('tdMeta').innerHTML = \\`<b>Assigned To:</b> \\${cmd.team} <br><br> <b>Target Zone:</b><br> \\${cmd.zone}\\`;\r\n            document.getElementById('tdStatus').innerHTML = \\`<span class=\"tag \\${getTagForStatus(cmd.status)}\">\\${cmd.status}</span>\\`;\r\n\r\n            // Public / Requester Details\r\n            const reqSection = document.getElementById('tdRequesterSection');\r\n            const reqName = document.getElementById('tdRequesterName');\r\n            const reqPhone = document.getElementById('tdRequesterPhone');\r\n            const reqItems = document.getElementById('tdRequesterItems');\r\n            const isRescue = ['sos', 'rescue', 'emergency'].includes(cmd.type.toLowerCase());\r\n\r\n            if (cmd.rescueReqId || cmd.requesterName || cmd.requesterPhone || isRescue) {\r\n                reqSection.style.display = 'block';\r\n                reqName.innerText = cmd.requesterName || 'Public Requester';\r\n                reqPhone.innerText = cmd.requesterPhone || 'Phone Not Available';\r\n\r\n                document.getElementById('tdRequesterId').innerText = cmd.rescueReqId ? \\`PUB-\\${cmd.rescueReqId}\\` : 'N/A';\r\n                document.getElementById('tdRequesterType').innerText = (cmd.requesterType || cmd.type || 'Emergency').toUpperCase();\r\n                document.getElementById('tdRequesterTime').innerText = cmd.reqTime || cmd.time;\r\n                document.getElementById('tdRequesterStatus').innerText = cmd.status || 'Active';\r\n                const locEl = document.getElementById('tdRequesterLoc');\r\n                if (cmd.requesterLat && cmd.requesterLng) {\r\n                    locEl.innerHTML = \\`<button class=\"btn btn-primary\" style=\"width:100%; padding:10px; font-weight:900; background:#1d4ed8; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px;\" onclick=\"map.flyTo([\\${cmd.requesterLat}, \\${cmd.requesterLng}], 18); window.open('https://www.google.com/maps/dir/?api=1&destination=\\${cmd.requesterLat},\\${cmd.requesterLng}', '_blank');\">\r\n                        <span>≡ƒôì NAVIGATE TO LOCATION</span>\r\n                        <small style=\"font-size:10px; opacity:0.8;\">(\\${parseFloat(cmd.requesterLat).toFixed(5)}, \\${parseFloat(cmd.requesterLng).toFixed(5)})</small>\r\n                    </button>\\`;\r\n                } else {\r\n                    locEl.innerHTML = '<span style=\"color:var(--text-muted)\">Coordinates Not Available</span>';\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                let itemsHtml = '<span style=\"color:var(--text-muted)\">No specific items listed</span>';\r\n                if (cmd.details) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        const d = typeof cmd.details === 'string' ? JSON.parse(cmd.details) : cmd.details;\r\n                        const items = [];\r\n                        if (d.food) items.push(\\`≡ƒì₧ Food: <b>\\${d.food}</b>\\`);\r\n                        if (d.med) items.push(\\`≡ƒÆè Medicine: <b>\\${d.med}</b>\\`);\r\n                        if (d.sanitary) items.push(\\`≡ƒº╗ Sanitary: <b>\\${d.sanitary}</b>\\`);\r\n                        if (items.length > 0) itemsHtml = items.join(' ΓÇó ');\r\n                    } catch (e) { }\r\n                }\r\n                const itemsListEl = document.getElementById('reqItemsList');\r\n                if (itemsListEl) itemsListEl.innerHTML = itemsHtml;\r\n\r\n                // Evidence Rendering\r\n                const imgContainer = document.getElementById('tdEvidenceImageContainer');\r\n                const commentBox = document.getElementById('tdRequesterComments');\r\n                const downloadBtn = document.getElementById('btnDownloadEvidence');\r\n\r\n                if (cmd.requesterImageUrl) {\r\n                    const fullUrl = formatMediaUrl(cmd.requesterImageUrl);\r\n                    imgContainer.innerHTML = \\`<img src=\"\\${fullUrl}\" style=\"width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover;\">\\`;\r\n                    downloadBtn.style.display = 'block';\r\n                    window.downloadEvidence = () => {\r\n                        const link = document.createElement('a');\r\n                        link.href = fullUrl;\r\n                        link.download = \\`Evidence_REQ_\\${cmd.rescueReqId}.jpg\\`;\r\n                        link.click();\r\n                    };\r\n                } else {\r\n                    imgContainer.innerHTML = \\`<span style=\"color:#1d4ed8; font-size:10px;\">No Image Provided</span>\\`;\r\n                    downloadBtn.style.display = 'none';\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                const audioContainer = document.getElementById('tdEvidenceAudioContainer');\r\n                const audioPlayer = document.getElementById('tdEvidenceAudioPlayer');\r\n                const downloadAudioLink = document.getElementById('btnDownloadAudio');\r\n                if (audioContainer && audioPlayer && downloadAudioLink) {\r\n                    if (cmd.requesterAudioUrl) {\r\n                        const audioFullUrl = formatMediaUrl(cmd.requesterAudioUrl);\r\n                        audioPlayer.src = audioFullUrl;\r\n                        downloadAudioLink.href = audioFullUrl;\r\n                        downloadAudioLink.download = \\`Audio_REQ_\\${cmd.rescueReqId || 'N_A'}.wav\\`;\r\n                        audioContainer.style.display = 'flex';\r\n                    } else {\r\n                        audioPlayer.src = '';\r\n                        audioContainer.style.display = 'none';\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                if (cmd.details) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        const d = typeof cmd.details === 'string' ? JSON.parse(cmd.details) : cmd.details;\r\n                        if (d.comments) {\r\n                            commentBox.innerText = \\`\"\\${d.comments}\"\\`;\r\n                        } else {\r\n                            commentBox.innerText = \"No additional comments provided by citizen.\";\r\n                        }\r\n                    } catch (e) {\r\n                        commentBox.innerText = \"No additional comments provided by citizen.\";\r\n                    }\r\n                } else {\r\n                    commentBox.innerText = \"No additional comments provided by citizen.\";\r\n                }\r\n            } else {\r\n                reqSection.style.display = 'none';\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            // Draw map area in blue\r\n            if (selectedCmdLayer) map.removeLayer(selectedCmdLayer);\r\n\r\n            if (cmd.type === 'group') {\r\n                const grp = groupedTasks.find(g => g.id === id);\r\n                if (grp) {\r\n                    drawGroupPerimeter(grp);\r\n                    // Use the perimeter as the selected layer for consistency\r\n                    selectedCmdLayer = groupPerimeters[grp.id];\r\n                }\r\n            } else if (cmd.layerData) {\r\n                let style = { color: '#2563eb', weight: 3, fillOpacity: 0.15, dashArray: null };\r\n                if (cmd.layerData.type === 'radius') {\r\n                    selectedCmdLayer = L.circle(cmd.layerData.latlng, { ...style, radius: cmd.layerData.radius }).addTo(map);\r\n                } else {\r\n                    selectedCmdLayer = L.rectangle(cmd.layerData.bounds, style).addTo(map);\r\n                }\r\n                map.flyToBounds(selectedCmdLayer.getBounds(), { padding: [50, 50], duration: 1 });\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            // Auto focus and smooth tracking on active mission\r\n            window.selectedTrackingCmdId = id;\r\n            window.selectedTrackingBounds = L.latLngBounds();\r\n\r\n            updateTacticalMap().then(() => {\r\n                if (window.selectedTrackingBounds && window.selectedTrackingBounds.isValid()) {\r\n                    // Include the command zone bounds if present\r\n                    if (selectedCmdLayer) {\r\n                        window.selectedTrackingBounds.extend(selectedCmdLayer.getBounds());\r\n                    }\r\n                    map.flyToBounds(window.selectedTrackingBounds, { padding: [60, 60], duration: 1.5 });\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n            if (window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function closeTaskDetails() {\r\n            document.getElementById('commandDetailsPanel').style.display = 'none';\r\n            document.getElementById('commandFormPanel').style.display = 'block';\r\n            if (selectedCmdLayer) {\r\n                map.removeLayer(selectedCmdLayer);\r\n                selectedCmdLayer = null;\r\n            }\r\n            window.selectedTrackingCmdId = null;\r\n            window.selectedTrackingBounds = null;\r\n            window.userInteractedWithMap = false;\r\n            updateTacticalMap(); // Refresh map to remove tracking lines\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function getTagForType(type) {\r\n            const m = {\r\n                sos: 'tag-red',\r\n                food: 'tag-yellow',\r\n                medical: 'tag-purple',\r\n                pregnancy: 'tag-special',\r\n                rescue: 'tag-red',\r\n                critical: 'tag-red',\r\n                normal: 'tag-blue',\r\n                group: 'tag-purple'\r\n            };\r\n            return m[type] || 'tag-gray';\r\n        }\r\n        function getTagForStatus(status) {\r\n            const s = (status || '').toLowerCase();\r\n            if (s === 'critical' || s === 'pending') return 'tag-red';\r\n            if (s === 'assigned' || s === 'acknowledged' || s === 'accepted') return 'tag-blue';\r\n            if (s === 'ongoing' || s === 'in_progress') return 'tag-yellow';\r\n            if (s === 'completed') return 'tag-green';\r\n            if (s === 'declined') return 'tag-gray';\r\n            return 'tag-gray';\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function renderCmds() {\r\n            let liveCritHtml = '';\r\n            let liveNormHtml = '';\r\n            let liveGroupedHtml = '';\r\n            let compHtml = '';\r\n            let histCriticalHtml = '';\r\n            let histNormalHtml = '';\r\n\r\n            let liveCritCount = 0;\r\n            let liveNormCount = 0;\r\n            let liveGroupedCount = 0;\r\n            let compCount = 0;\r\n            let critHistCount = 0;\r\n            let normHistCount = 0;\r\n\r\n            // Collect all rescueReqIds from active group commands\r\n            const activeGroupReqIds = new Set();\r\n            cmds.forEach(gc => {\r\n                const s = (gc.status || '').toLowerCase();\r\n                const isOngoing = ['ongoing', 'critical', 'pending', 'accepted', 'assigned', 'acknowledged', 'declined', 'in_progress', 'active'].includes(s);\r\n                if (gc.type === 'group' && isOngoing && gc.requestIds) {\r\n                    gc.requestIds.forEach(id => activeGroupReqIds.add(String(id)));\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n\r\n            cmds.forEach((c) => {\r\n                const s = (c.status || '').toLowerCase();\r\n                const isOngoing = ['ongoing', 'critical', 'pending', 'accepted', 'assigned', 'acknowledged', 'declined', 'in_progress', 'active'].includes(s);\r\n\r\n                // Skip if this is an individual command belonging to a request that is part of an active/ongoing grouped command\r\n                if (isOngoing && c.type !== 'group' && c.rescueReqId && activeGroupReqIds.has(String(c.rescueReqId))) {\r\n                    return;\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                const isCrit = c.priority === 'critical' || (c.requesterUrgency === 'critical') || ['sos', 'medical', 'pregnancy', 'critical', 'rescue'].includes((c.type || '').toLowerCase());\r\n                const isReassignable = s !== 'completed';\r\n\r\n                let infoText = '-';\r\n                if (c.details) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        const d = typeof c.details === 'string' && c.details.startsWith('{') ? JSON.parse(c.details) : c.details;\r\n                        infoText = d.missions || d.comments || (typeof d === 'string' ? d : d.sector) || '-';\r\n                    } catch (e) {\r\n                        infoText = c.details;\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n                // Truncate infoText if it's too long\r\n                if (infoText.length > 30) infoText = infoText.substring(0, 30) + '...';\r\n\r\n                let evidenceThumb = '-';\r\n                if (c.requesterImageUrl) {\r\n                    const thumbUrl = formatMediaUrl(c.requesterImageUrl);\r\n                    evidenceThumb = \\`<img src=\"\\${thumbUrl}\" style=\"width:40px; height:40px; border-radius:6px; object-fit:cover; border:2px solid \\${isCrit ? '#ef4444' : 'var(--border)'};\" onclick=\"event.stopPropagation(); window.open('\\${thumbUrl}', '_blank');\">\\`;\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                let evidenceAudio = '-';\r\n                if (c.requesterAudioUrl) {\r\n                    const audioUrl = formatMediaUrl(c.requesterAudioUrl);\r\n                    evidenceAudio = \\`<div style=\"display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:4px; align-items:center; min-width: 140px;\">\r\n                        <audio controls style=\"width:130px; height:24px;\" onclick=\"event.stopPropagation();\">\r\n                            <source src=\"\\${audioUrl}\" type=\"audio/wav\">\r\n                            <source src=\"\\${audioUrl}\" type=\"audio/mpeg\">\r\n                            Your browser does not support audio.\r\n                        </audio>\r\n                        <a href=\"\\${audioUrl}\" target=\"_blank\" onclick=\"event.stopPropagation();\" style=\"font-size:10px; font-weight:800; color:var(--primary); text-decoration:none;\">≡ƒôÑ Download</a>\r\n                    </div>\\`;\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                let closureThumb = '-';\r\n                if (c.completion_image_url) {\r\n                    const closureUrl = formatMediaUrl(c.completion_image_url);\r\n                    closureThumb = \\`<img src=\"\\${closureUrl}\" style=\"width:40px; height:40px; border-radius:6px; object-fit:cover; border:2px solid #22c55e;\" onclick=\"event.stopPropagation(); window.open('\\${closureUrl}', '_blank');\">\\`;\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                let row = \\`<tr onclick=\"\\${isOngoing ? \\`selectTask('\\${c.id}')\\` : \\`openCompletedTaskDetailModal('\\${c.id}')\\`}\" style=\"cursor:pointer;\" onmouseover=\"this.style.background='#f8fafc'\" onmouseout=\"this.style.background='transparent'\">\r\n                    <td style=\"font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-muted);\">{SNO}</td>\r\n                    <td style=\"font-weight:700;\">\\${c.id}</td>\r\n                    <td>\\${c.desc}</td>\r\n                    <td style=\"font-size:11px; color:var(--text-muted);\">\\${infoText}</td>\r\n                    <td>\\${evidenceThumb}</td>\r\n                    <td>\\${evidenceAudio}</td>\r\n                    <td>\r\n                        <span class=\"tag \\${getTagForType(c.type)}\">\\${(c.type || 'N/A').toUpperCase()}</span>\r\n                    </td>\r\n                    <td>\\${c.zone}</td>\r\n                    <td>\\${c.team}</td>\r\n                    <td style=\"color:var(--text-muted); font-size: 12px;\">\\${c.reqTime || c.time}</td>\r\n                    <td style=\"color:var(--text-muted); font-size: 12px;\">\\${c.cmdTime || c.time}</td>\r\n                    <td><span class=\"tag \\${getTagForStatus(c.status)}\">\\${c.status}</span></td>\r\n                    <td>\\${closureThumb}</td>\r\n                    <td>\r\n                        <div style=\"display:flex; gap:4px;\">\r\n                            \\${isOngoing ? \\`<button class=\"btn btn-primary\" style=\"padding:4px 8px; font-size:10px; background: #ef4444; border-color: #ef4444; color: white;\" onclick=\"event.stopPropagation(); closeTaskByAdmin('\\${c.id}')\">Γ£à Close</button>\\` : ''}\r\n                            \\${isReassignable ? \\`<button class=\"btn btn-primary\" style=\"padding:4px 8px; font-size:10px; background: #eab308; border-color: #eab308; color: white;\" onclick=\"event.stopPropagation(); openReassignModal('\\${c.id}')\">≡ƒöä Re-Assign</button>\\` : ''}\r\n                            <button class=\"btn btn-primary\" style=\"padding:4px 8px; font-size:10px; background: #0ea5e9; border-color: #0ea5e9; color: white;\" onclick=\"event.stopPropagation(); \\${isOngoing ? \\`selectTask('\\${c.id}')\\` : \\`openCompletedTaskDetailModal('\\${c.id}')\\`}\">≡ƒæü∩╕Å View</button>\r\n                        </div>\r\n                    </td>\r\n                </tr>\\`;\r\n\r\n                if (isOngoing) {\r\n                    if ((c.type || '').toLowerCase() === 'group') {\r\n                        liveGroupedCount++;\r\n                        liveGroupedHtml += row.replace('{SNO}', String(liveGroupedCount).padStart(2, '0'));\r\n                    } else if (isCrit) {\r\n                        liveCritCount++;\r\n                        liveCritHtml += row.replace('{SNO}', String(liveCritCount).padStart(2, '0'));\r\n                    } else {\r\n                        liveNormCount++;\r\n                        liveNormHtml += row.replace('{SNO}', String(liveNormCount).padStart(2, '0'));\r\n                    }\r\n                } else {\r\n                    // status is 'Completed' or anything else treated as done\r\n                    compCount++;\r\n                    compHtml += row.replace('{SNO}', String(compCount).padStart(2, '0'));\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                let historyRow = \\`\\`; // Deprecated, we render history lists from rescueRequests below\r\n            });\r\n\r\n            // POPULATE CRITICAL AND NORMAL HISTORY LOGS FROM rescueRequests\r\n            histCriticalHtml = '';\r\n            histNormalHtml = '';\r\n            critHistCount = 0;\r\n            normHistCount = 0;\r\n\r\n            rescueRequests.forEach((r) => {\r\n                const s = (r.status || 'pending').toLowerCase();\r\n                if (s === 'pending' || s === 'declined') {\r\n                    return;\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                const isOngoing = ['assigned', 'accepted', 'acknowledged', 'in_progress'].includes(s);\r\n\r\n                // Apply historyStatusFilter\r\n                if (historyStatusFilter === 'ongoing' && !isOngoing) return;\r\n                if (historyStatusFilter === 'completed' && isOngoing) return;\r\n\r\n                const isCrit = (r.priority || '').toLowerCase() === 'critical' || \r\n                               (r.urgency || '').toLowerCase() === 'critical' || \r\n                               ['sos', 'medical', 'pregnancy', 'critical', 'rescue'].includes((r.type || '').toLowerCase());\r\n\r\n                let infoText = r.details || '-';\r\n                if (infoText.length > 30) infoText = infoText.substring(0, 30) + '...';\r\n\r\n                let evidenceThumb = '-';\r\n                if (r.image_url) {\r\n                    const thumbUrl = formatMediaUrl(r.image_url);\r\n                    evidenceThumb = \\`<img src=\"\\${thumbUrl}\" style=\"width:40px; height:40px; border-radius:6px; object-fit:cover; border:2px solid \\${isCrit ? '#ef4444' : 'var(--border)'};\" onclick=\"event.stopPropagation(); window.open('\\${thumbUrl}', '_blank');\">\\`;\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                let evidenceAudio = '-';\r\n                if (r.audio_url) {\r\n                    const audioUrl = formatMediaUrl(r.audio_url);\r\n                    evidenceAudio = \\`<div style=\"display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:4px; align-items:center; min-width: 140px;\">\r\n                        <audio controls style=\"width:130px; height:24px;\" onclick=\"event.stopPropagation();\">\r\n                            <source src=\"\\${audioUrl}\" type=\"audio/wav\">\r\n                            <source src=\"\\${audioUrl}\" type=\"audio/mpeg\">\r\n                            Your browser does not support audio.\r\n                        </audio>\r\n                        <a href=\"\\${audioUrl}\" target=\"_blank\" onclick=\"event.stopPropagation();\" style=\"font-size:10px; font-weight:800; color:var(--primary); text-decoration:none;\">≡ƒôÑ Download</a>\r\n                    </div>\\`;\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                let closureThumb = '-';\r\n                if (r.completion_image_url) {\r\n                    const closureUrl = formatMediaUrl(r.completion_image_url);\r\n                    closureThumb = \\`<img src=\"\\${closureUrl}\" style=\"width:40px; height:40px; border-radius:6px; object-fit:cover; border:2px solid #22c55e;\" onclick=\"event.stopPropagation(); window.open('\\${closureUrl}', '_blank');\">\\`;\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                let assignedTo = 'Unassigned';\r\n                if (r.assigned_officer_name) {\r\n                    assignedTo = \\`≡ƒæñ \\${r.assigned_officer_name}\\`;\r\n                } else if (r.assigned_group_name) {\r\n                    assignedTo = \\`≡ƒæÑ \\${r.assigned_group_name}\\`;\r\n                } else if (r.assigned_user_id) {\r\n                    assignedTo = \\`Rescuer \\${r.assigned_user_id}\\`;\r\n                } else if (r.assigned_group_id) {\r\n                    assignedTo = \\`Group \\${r.assigned_group_id}\\`;\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                let declinedBy = '-';\r\n                let declinedMatches = (r.details || '').match(/\\\\[Declined by Rescuer ID: (.*?)\\\\]/g);\r\n                if (declinedMatches) {\r\n                    declinedBy = declinedMatches.map(m => m.replace(/\\\\[Declined by Rescuer ID: |\\\\]/g, '')).join(', ');\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                const displayId = \\`REQ-\\${r.id}\\`;\r\n                const formattedReqTime = formatLocalTime(r.created_at);\r\n                const formattedCmdTime = r.updated_at ? formatLocalTime(r.updated_at) : formattedReqTime;\r\n\r\n                // Let's link child/grouped tasks to their active command IDs for Close/Reassign actions\r\n                let actionBtnId = displayId;\r\n                let activeCmdForReq = cmds.find(c => {\r\n                    if (c.rescueReqId && c.rescueReqId.toString() === r.id.toString()) return true;\r\n                    if (c.requestIds && c.requestIds.some(id => id.toString() === r.id.toString())) return true;\r\n                    return false;\r\n                });\r\n                if (activeCmdForReq) {\r\n                    actionBtnId = activeCmdForReq.id;\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                let historyRowHtml = \\`<tr onclick=\"\\${isOngoing ? \\`selectTask('\\${displayId}')\\` : \\`openCompletedTaskDetailModal('\\${displayId}')\\`}\" style=\"cursor:pointer;\" onmouseover=\"this.style.background='#f8fafc'\" onmouseout=\"this.style.background='transparent'\">\r\n                    <td style=\"font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-muted);\">{SNO}</td>\r\n                    <td style=\"font-weight:700;\">\\${displayId}</td>\r\n                    <td>\\${(r.type || 'Request').toUpperCase()} TASK</td>\r\n                    <td style=\"font-size:11px;   <span class=\"tag \\${getTagForType(r.type)}\">\\${(r.type || 'N/A').toUpperCase()}</span>\r\n                    </td>\r\n                    <td>\\${r.sector || 'N/A'}</td>\r\n                    <td>\\${assignedTo}</td>\r\n                      <td style=\"color:#ef4444; font-weight:600; font-size:12px;\">\\${declinedBy}</td>\r\n                      <td style=\"color:var(--text-muted);       <span class=\"tag\" style=\"background:\\${r.assigned_by === 'AI' ?                 <td>\\${closureThumb}</td>\r\n                    <td>\r\n                        <div style=\"display:flex; gap:4px;\">\r\n                            \\${isOngoing ? \\`<button
