</tr>\\`;\r\n\r\n                if (isCrit) {\r\n                    critHistCount++;\r\n                    histCriticalHtml += historyRowHtml.replace('{SNO}', String(critHistCount).padStart(2, '0'));\r\n                } else {\r\n                    normHistCount++;\r\n                    histNormalHtml += historyRowHtml.replace('{SNO}', String(normHistCount).padStart(2, '0'));\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n\r\n            const tableHeader = \\`<tr>\r\n                <th style=\"width: 50px;\">S.NO</th>\r\n                <th style=\"width: 90px;\">ID</th>\r\n                <th style=\"width: 200px;\">TASK / DESCRIPTION</th>\r\n                <th style=\"width: 150px;\">INFORMATION</th>\r\n                <th style=\"width: 80px;\">IMAGE</th>\r\n                <th style=\"width: 150px;\">AUDIO</th>\r\n                <th style=\"width: 100px;\">TYPE</th>\r\n                <th style=\"width: 150px;\">ZONE / AREA</th>\r\n                <th style=\"width: 150px;\">ASSIGNED TO</th>\r\n                  <th style=\"width: 150px;\">DECLINED BY</th>\r\n                <th style=\"width: 80px;\">REQ</th>\r\n                <th style=\"width: 80px;\">CMD</th>\r\n                <th style=\"width: 100px;\">STATUS</th>\r\n                <th style=\"width: 100px;\">CLOSURE REPORT</th>\r\n                <th style=\"width: 160px;\">ACTION</th>\r\n            </tr>\\`;\r\n\r\n            // Apply headers to all tables\r\n            // Apply headers to all tables (Live, Completed, and History)\r\n            document.querySelectorAll('#cmd-live table thead, #page-history table thead').forEach(thead => {\r\n                thead.innerHTML = tableHeader;\r\n            });\r\n\r\n            document.getElementById('liveCmdBodyCritical').innerHTML = liveCritHtml || '<tr><td colspan=\"14\" style=\"text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted)\">No critical commands</td></tr>';\r\n            document.getElementById('liveCmdBodyNormal').innerHTML = liveNormHtml || '<tr><td colspan=\"14\" style=\"text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted)\">No normal commands</td></tr>';\r\n            document.getElementById('liveCmdBodyGrouped').innerHTML = liveGroupedHtml || '<tr><td colspan=\"14\" style=\"text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted)\">No grouped commands</td></tr>';\r\n            const compTbody = document.getElementById('compCmdBody');\r\n            if (compTbody) compTbody.innerHTML = compHtml || '<tr><td colspan=\"14\" style=\"text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted)\">No completed commands</td></tr>';\r\n\r\n            // Update live command buttons with badges\r\n            if (document.getElementById('badgeLiveCritical')) {\r\n                const el = document.getElementById('badgeLiveCritical');\r\n                el.innerText = liveCritCount;\r\n                el.style.display = liveCritCount > 0 ? 'inline-block' : 'none';\r\n            }\r\n            if (document.getElementById('badgeLiveNormal')) {\r\n                const el = document.getElementById('badgeLiveNormal');\r\n                el.innerText = liveNormCount;\r\n                el.style.display = liveNormCount > 0 ? 'inline-block' : 'none';\r\n            }\r\n            if (document.getElementById('badgeLiveGrouped')) {\r\n                const el = document.getElementById('badgeLiveGrouped');\r\n                el.innerText = liveGroupedCount;\r\n                el.style.display = liveGroupedCount > 0 ? 'inline-block' : 'none';\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            document.getElementById('historyTbodyCritical').innerHTML = histCriticalHtml || '<tr><td colspan=\"14\" style=\"text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted)\">No critical history found</td></tr>';\r\n            document.getElementById('historyTbodyNormal').innerHTML = histNormalHtml || '<tr><td colspan=\"14\" style=\"text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted)\">No normal history found</td></tr>';\r\n\r\n            // Populate Group History\r\n            const histGroupHtml = cmds.filter(c => {\r\n                if (c.type !== 'group') return false;\r\n                const s = (c.status || '').toLowerCase();\r\n                const isOngoing = ['ongoing', 'critical', 'pending', 'accepted', 'assigned', 'acknowledged', 'declined', 'in_progress', 'active'].includes(s);\r\n                if (historyStatusFilter === 'ongoing' && !isOngoing) return false;\r\n                if (historyStatusFilter === 'completed' && isOngoing) return false;\r\n                return true;\r\n            }).map((c, i) => {\r\n                let groupDetails = '-';\r\n                if (c.details) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        const parsed = JSON.parse(c.details);\r\n                        groupDetails = parsed.missions || c.details;\r\n                    } catch (e) {\r\n                        groupDetails = c.details;\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                const s = (c.status || '').toLowerCase();\r\n                const isOngoing = ['ongoing', 'critical', 'pending', 'accepted', 'assigned', 'acknowledged', 'declined', 'in_progress', 'active'].includes(s);\r\n                \r\n                let closureThumb = '-';\r\n                if (c.completion_image_url) {\r\n                    const closureUrl = formatMediaUrl(c.completion_image_url);\r\n                    closureThumb = \\`<img src=\"\\${closureUrl}\" style=\"width:40px; height:40px; border-radius:6px; object-fit:cover; border:2px solid #22c55e;\" onclick=\"event.stopPropagation(); window.open('\\${closureUrl}', '_blank');\">\\`;\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                return \\`\r\n                <tr onclick=\"\\${isOngoing ? \\`selectTask('\\${c.id}')\\` : \\`openCompletedTaskDetailModal('\\${c.id}')\\`}\" style=\"cursor:pointer;\" onmouseover=\"this.style.background='#f8fafc'\" onmouseout=\"this.style.background='transparent'\">\r\n                    <td style=\"font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-muted);\">\\${String(i + 1).padStart(2, '0')}</td>\r\n                    <td style=\"font-weight:700;\">\\${c.id}</td>\r\n                    <td style=\"font-weight:700; color:var(--special);\">\\${c.desc}</td>\r\n                    <td style=\"font-size:11px; color:var(--text-muted);\">\\${groupDetails}</td>\r\n                    <td>-</td>\r\n                    <td>-</td>\r\n                    <td><span class=\"tag tag-purple\">GROUP</span></td>\r\n                    <td>\\${c.zone}</td>\r\n                    <td>\\${c.team}</td>\r\n                    <td style=\"color:var(--text-muted); font-size: 11px;\">-</td>\r\n                    <td style=\"color:var(--text-muted); font-size: 11px;\">\\${c.time}</td>\r\n                    <td><span class=\"tag \\${getTagForStatus(c.status)}\">\\${c.status}</span></td>\r\n                    <td>\\${closureThumb}</td>\r\n                    <td style=\"display:flex; gap:6px;\">\r\n                        \\${isOngoing ? \\`<button class=\"btn btn-primary\" style=\"padding:4px 8px; font-size:10px; background: #ef4444; border-color: #ef4444; color: white;\" onclick=\"event.stopPropagation(); closeTaskByAdmin('\\${c.id}')\">Γ£à CLOSE</button>\\` : ''}\r\n                        \\${isOngoing ? \\`<button class=\"btn btn-primary\" style=\"padding:4px 8px; font-size:10px; background: #eab308; border-color: #eab308; color: white;\" onclick=\"event.stopPropagation(); openReassignModal('\\${c.id}')\">≡ƒöä RE-ASSIGN</button>\\` : ''}\r\n                        <button class=\"btn btn-primary\" style=\"padding:4px 8px; font-size:10px; background: #0ea5e9; border-color: #0ea5e9; color: white;\" onclick=\"event.stopPropagation(); \\${isOngoing ? \\`selectTask('\\${c.id}')\\` : \\`openCompletedTaskDetailModal('\\${c.id}')\\`}\">≡ƒæü∩╕Å VIEW</button>\r\n                    </td>\r\n                </tr>\r\n            \\`;\r\n            }).join('');\r\n\r\n            const groupTbody = document.getElementById('historyTbodyGrouped');\r\n            if (groupTbody) groupTbody.innerHTML = histGroupHtml || '<tr><td colspan=\"14\" style=\"text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted)\">No tactical group history available</td></tr>';\r\n\r\n            // Handle Critical Operations Hub\r\n            const criticalMissions = cmds.filter(c => {\r\n                const s = (c.status || '').toLowerCase();\r\n                const t = (c.type || '').toLowerCase();\r\n                return (t === 'critical' || t === 'sos' || t === 'medical') && s !== 'completed';\r\n            });\r\n            const hub = document.getElementById('criticalOperationsHub');\r\n            const hubList = document.getElementById('criticalTasksList');\r\n\r\n            if (criticalMissions.length > 0) {\r\n                hub.style.display = 'block';\r\n                hubList.innerHTML = criticalMissions.map(m => \\`\r\n                    <div class=\"card\" style=\"margin:0; border-left: 4px solid var(--critical); background:rgba(239,68,68,0.02); padding:12px;\">\r\n                        <div style=\"display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start; margin-bottom:8px;\">\r\n                            <div style=\"font-weight:900; color:var(--critical); font-size:14px;\">\\${m.id}</div>\r\n                            <span class=\"tag tag-red\" style=\"font-size:10px;\">URGENT</span>\r\n                        </div>\r\n                        <div style=\"font-weight:700; font-size:13px; margin-bottom:4px;\">\\${m.desc}</div>\r\n                        <div style=\"font-size:11px; color:var(--text-muted); margin-bottom:10px;\">\r\n                            <b>Assigned:</b> \\${m.team} <br>\r\n                            <b>Target:</b> \\${m.zone} <br>\r\n                            <b>Status:</b> <span class=\"tag \\${getTagForStatus(m.status)}\" style=\"font-size:9px; padding:1px 4px;\">\\${m.status}</span>\r\n                            \\${m.requesterName ? \\`<br><span style=\"display:inline-block; margin-top:4px; color:var(--primary); font-weight:700;\">≡ƒæñ Requester: \\${m.requesterName}</span>\\` : ''}\r\n                        </div>\r\n                        <div style=\"display:flex; gap:8px;\">\r\n                            <button class=\"btn btn-primary\" style=\"flex:1; padding:6px; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; background: #eab308; border-color: #eab308; color: white;\" onclick=\"openReassignModal('\\${m.id}')\">≡ƒöä RE ASSIGN TASK</button>\r\n                            <button class=\"btn btn-primary\" style=\"flex:1; padding:6px; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; background: #ef4444; border-color: #ef4444; color: white;\" onclick=\"event.stopPropagation(); closeTaskByAdmin('\\${m.id}')\">Γ£à CLOSE</button>\r\n                            <button class=\"btn
